---
title: "LIM Sponge Analysis"
author: "Raz"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: html_document
---

### LIM Model Setup Function
```{r, fig.width=15,fig.height=10}

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This chunk defines the core function used to initialize and construct
# the Linear Inverse Model (LIM) system.
#
# The function `testsetup` processes the LIM input structure (`liminput`)
# and converts it into the mathematical representation required for
# inverse modeling.
#
# Main responsibilities of this function:
# - Compute parameter, component, and external values based on
#   hierarchical dependencies
# - Build the system matrices (A, B) representing mass-balance equations
# - Construct constraint matrices (G, H) for inequality conditions
# - Handle optional elements such as variables, cost/profit functions,
#   and markers
# - Identify unknowns (flows, reactions, or state variables) depending
#   on the selected model type
# - Return a structured object of class "lim" containing all matrices
#   and metadata required for solving the model
#
# NOTE:
# This is a foundational step in the LIM workflow and must be executed
# before running any model simulations or flux estimations.
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------



testsetup <- function (liminput, ...) 
{
    calcterm <- function(term, usecomp = TRUE) {
        calc <- term$val
        if (!is.na(term$par1)) 
            calc <- calc * parval[term$par1]
        if (!is.na(term$par2)) 
            calc <- calc * parval[term$par2]
        if (!is.na(term$par3)) 
            calc <- calc * parval[term$par3]
        if (!is.na(term$par4)) 
            calc <- calc * parval[term$par4]
        if (!is.na(term$comp))
        	  if (usecomp) calc <- calc * compval[term$comp]
        if (!is.na(term$external)) 
            if (usecomp) calc <- calc * externval[term$extern]
        return(calc)
    }
    calcvalues <- function(pars, npar) {
        if (npar == 0) 
            return(NULL)
        parval <- rep(0, length = npar)
        for (i in 1:npar) {
            term <- pars[pars$nr == i, ]
            for (ii in 1:nrow(term)) {
                parval[i] <- parval[i] + calcterm(term[ii, ])
            }
        }
        return(parval)
    }
    calcvariable <- function(vars, ii, vec = rep(0, nunkn + 1)) {
        term <- vars[vars$nr == ii, ]
        for (i in 1:nrow(term)) {
            ct <- calcterm(term[i, ])
            iv <- term$var[i]
            ifl <- term[i, unkncol]
            if (!is.na(iv)) 
                vec[1:nunkn] <- vec[1:nunkn] + varmat[iv, 1:nunkn] * 
                  ct
            if (!is.na(ifl)) {
                vec[ifl] <- vec[ifl] + ct
            }
            if (is.na(iv) & is.na(ifl)) 
                vec[nunkn + 1] <- vec[nunkn + 1] - ct
        }
        return(vec)
    }
    ncomp <- length(liminput$compnames)
    nextern <- length(liminput$externnames)
    ifelse(is.null(liminput$rate), nrate <- 0, nrate <- ncomp)
    ifelse(is.null(liminput$marker), nmarker <- 0, nmarker <- nrow(liminput$marker))
    npar <- length(liminput$parnames)
    nvars <- length(liminput$varnames)
    flows <- liminput$flows
    reactions <- liminput$reactions
    ispos <- TRUE
    ifelse(is.null(reactions), nreac <- 0, nreac <- max(reactions$nr))
    nflow <- nrow(flows)
    neqs <- nineqs <- 0
    if (is.null(nflow)) 
        nflow <- 0
    if (liminput$Type == "flow") 
        Unknown <- "F"
    else if (liminput$Type == "reaction") 
        Unknown <- "R"
    else Unknown <- "S"
    if (Unknown == "F") {
        nunkn <- nflow
        if (nunkn == 0) 
            stop("cannot create inverse matrices: number of flows=0")
        unkncol <- 9
        Unknownnames <- liminput$flows$name
        if (any(!liminput$posreac)) 
            ispos <- FALSE
    }
    else if (Unknown == "R") {
        nunkn <- max(reactions$nr)
        if (nunkn == 0) 
            stop("cannot create inverse matrices: number of unknowns =0")
        unkncol <- 12
        Unknownnames <- unique(liminput$reactions$name)
        if (any(!liminput$posreac)) 
            ispos <- FALSE
    }
    else {
        nunkn <- ncomp
        unkncol <- 10
        if (nunkn == 0) 
            stop("cannot create inverse matrices: number of components=0")
        Unknownnames <- liminput$compnames
    }
    parval <- rep(NA, npar)
    compval <- rep(NA, ncomp)
    if (!is.null(liminput$pars)) {
        while (any(is.na(parval))) parval <- calcvalues(liminput$pars, 
            npar)
    }
    ifelse(Unknown %in% c("F", "R"), compval <- calcvalues(liminput$comp, 
        ncomp), compval <- rep(1, ncomp))
    externval <- calcvalues(liminput$extern, nextern)
    rateval <- calcvalues(liminput$rate, nrate)
    markerval <- calcvalues(liminput$marker, nmarker)
    if (length(rateval) == 0) 
        rateval <- rep(0, ncomp)
    rateval[is.na(rateval)] <- 0
    VarA <- VarB <- NULL
    if (!is.null(liminput$vars)) {
        varmat <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = nvars, ncol = nunkn + 
            1)
        for (i in 1:nvars) varmat[i, ] <- calcvariable(liminput$vars, 
            i)
        VarA <- varmat[, 1:nunkn]
        VarB <- varmat[, nunkn + 1]
        if (nvars > 1) 
            ii <- which(rowSums(abs(VarA)) == 0)
        else ii <- NULL
        if (length(ii) > 0) {
            print(liminput$varnames[ii])
            stop(paste("cannot proceed: the above variable(s) are  not a true variable, but a parameter:"))
        }
    }
    eqmat <- NULL
    if (!is.null(liminput$equations)) {
        neqs <- max(liminput$equations$nr)
        eqmat <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = neqs, ncol = nunkn + 
            1)
        for (i in 1:neqs) eqmat[i, ] <- calcvariable(liminput$equations, 
            i)
    }
    ineqmat <- NULL
    if (!is.null(liminput$constraints)) {
        nineqs <- max(liminput$constraints$nr)
        ineqmat <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = nineqs, ncol = nunkn + 
            1)
        for (i in 1:nineqs) ineqmat[i, ] <- calcvariable(liminput$constraints, 
            i)
    }
    cost <- NULL
    if (!is.null(liminput$cost)) {
        ncost <- max(liminput$cost$nr)
        costmat <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = ncost, ncol = nunkn + 
            1)
        for (i in 1:ncost) costmat[i, ] <- calcvariable(liminput$cost, 
            i)
        cost <- costmat[, 1:nunkn]
    }
    profit <- NULL
    if (!is.null(liminput$profit)) {
        nprofit <- max(liminput$profit$nr)
        profitmat <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = nprofit, ncol = nunkn + 
            1)
        for (i in 1:nprofit) profitmat[i, ] <- calcvariable(liminput$profit, 
            i)
        profit <- profitmat[, 1:nunkn]
    }
    A <- B <- G <- H <- NULL
    if (nflow > 0) {
        A <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = ncomp, ncol = nunkn)
        for (i in 1:nflow) {
            if (flows$from[i] > 0) 
                A[flows$from[i], i] <- A[flows$from[i], i] - 
                  1
            if (flows$to[i] > 0) 
                A[flows$to[i], i] <- A[flows$to[i], i] + 1
        }
        B <- rateval
    }
    else if (nreac > 0) {
        A <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = ncomp, ncol = nunkn)
        for (i in 1:nrow(reactions)) {
            st <- reactions[i, "comp"]
            rr <- reactions[i, "nr"]
            A[st, rr] <- A[st, rr] + calcterm(reactions[i, ], usecomp = FALSE)
        }
        B <- rateval
    }
    if (!is.null(eqmat)) {
        A <- rbind(A, eqmat[, 1:nunkn])
        B <- c(B, eqmat[, nunkn + 1])
    }
    if (nflow > 0 || nreac > 0) {
        Aext <- cbind(A[1:ncomp, ], rateval)
        Aext[Aext != 0] <- 1
        RS <- rowSums(Aext)
        if (any(RS <= 1)) {
            warning("following component(s) is possibly an external:")
            warning(paste(" ", liminput$compnames[which(RS <= 
                1)]))
        }
        G <- diag(nunkn)
        G <- G[liminput$posreac, ]
        H <- rep(0, sum(liminput$posreac))
    }
    if (!is.null(ineqmat)) {
        G <- rbind(ineqmat[, 1:nunkn], G)
        H <- c(ineqmat[, nunkn + 1], H)
    }
    if (nflow > 0) {
        nel <- ncomp + nextern
        elnames <- c(liminput$compnames, liminput$externnames)
        Flowmatrix <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = nel, ncol = nel, 
            dimnames = list(elnames, elnames))
        flowsft <- as.matrix(flows[, 1:2])
        flowsft[flowsft < 0] <- -flowsft[flowsft < 0] + ncomp
        Flowmatrix[flowsft] <- 1:nflow
    }
    else Flowmatrix <- NULL
    if (nmarker == 0) {
        markers = NULL
    }
    else markers = data.frame(name = c(liminput$compnames, liminput$externnames), 
        val = markerval)
    res <- list(file = liminput$file, NUnknowns = nunkn, NEquations = neqs, 
        NConstraints = nineqs, NComponents = ncomp, NExternal = nrow(liminput$extern), 
        NVariables = nvars, A = A, B = B, G = G, H = H, Cost = cost, 
        Profit = profit, Flowmatrix = Flowmatrix, VarA = VarA, 
        VarB = VarB, Parameters = data.frame(name = liminput$parnames, 
            val = parval), Components = data.frame(name = liminput$compnames, 
            val = compval), Externals = data.frame(name = liminput$externnames, 
            val = externval), rates = data.frame(name = liminput$compnames, 
            val = rateval), markers = markers, Variables = liminput$varnames, 
        costnames = unique(liminput$cost$name), profitnames = unique(liminput$profit$name), 
        eqnames = unique(liminput$equations$name), ineqnames = unique(liminput$constraints$name), 
        Unknowns = Unknownnames, ispos = ispos)
    class(res) <- "lim"
    return(res)
}



```


### Metabolic network model — SMALL sponges (Agelas oroides-updated ranges)
```{r, fig.width=15,fig.height=10}

# ==============================================================================
# Metabolic network model — SMALL sponges (Agelas oroides-updated ranges)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
#   Run the SMALL LIM model using Agelas-derived parameter ranges wherever
#   possible, instead of relying only on base values from the input file.
#
# MAIN IDEAS IN THIS VERSION
#   1) Track progress mainly by ACCEPTED solutions, because that is the true
#      bottleneck in this workflow.
#   2) Reduce memory use by saving only summary statistics per accepted model,
#      instead of saving every Xsample draw.
#   3) Add a CHEAP DIC PRE-CHECK before the expensive full Xsample step.
#   4) Keep detailed status logs so we can see whether the run is alive.
#
# IMPORTANT
#   - DIC is still not enforced as a hard LIM constraint.
#   - Instead, it is used as a compatibility filter after sampling.
#   - In this version, we do:
#       a) a small pilot Xsample for cheap DIC pre-check
#       b) only if that looks promising, a full Xsample
#
# WHY THIS SHOULD HELP
#   - Lower memory use
#   - Less disk writing
#   - Easier to understand what is happening
#   - Better visibility into the slow stage: finding accepted solutions
# ==============================================================================


# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) Load packages
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
require(LIM)
require(dplyr)
require(tidyr)
require(readr)
require(tibble)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) Read LIM input + initial sanity check
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
file <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/Geodia barretti/4139792/Agelas_oroides_median_ci_rebuilt.input"

stopifnot(file.exists(file))

readLIM <- Read(file)

cat("Input file loaded successfully.\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) Reproducibility
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
seed_used <- sample.int(.Machine$integer.max, 1)
set.seed(seed_used)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) Output folder
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
run_id  <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
out_dir <- file.path(getwd(), paste0("SMALL_run_", run_id))
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

cat("All outputs will be saved to:\n", out_dir, "\n")

file.copy(file, file.path(out_dir, basename(file)), overwrite = TRUE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) Settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# IMPORTANT:
# target_solutions is the main goal.
# max_iterations is a safety cap.
#
# pilot_xsample_iter:
#   small pilot sample used only for cheap DIC pre-check
#
# full_xsample_iter:
#   bigger sample used only for models that passed pilot DIC pre-check
#
# SAVE_EVERY:
#   flush to disk every N accepted solutions
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
max_iterations     <- 1000000
target_solutions   <- 1000

pilot_xsample_iter <- 30
full_xsample_iter  <- 200

SAVE_EVERY         <- 50
STATUS_EVERY       <- 100

# Optional stricter rules:
# minimum fraction of pilot/full draws that must fall inside DIC range
min_frac_in_DIC_pilot <- 0.01
min_frac_in_DIC_full  <- 0.01

# Counters
n_attempted           <- 0L
n_accepted            <- 0L
n_invalid_fraction    <- 0L
n_testsetup_error     <- 0L
n_infeasible          <- 0L
n_pilot_xsample_error <- 0L
n_full_xsample_error  <- 0L
n_rejected_DIC_pilot  <- 0L
n_rejected_DIC_full   <- 0L

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) Helper functions
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Safe setter for a parameter in readLIM
set_par <- function(obj, nm, value) {
  idx <- which(obj$pars$name == nm)
  if (length(idx) != 1) stop("Parameter not found or duplicated in LIM file: ", nm)
  obj$pars$val[idx] <- value
  obj
}

# Base parameter table from the input file
base_pars <- readLIM$pars %>%
  dplyr::select(name, val) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(val = as.numeric(val))

# Read one numeric parameter directly from the input file
get_input_num <- function(nm) {
  v <- base_pars$val[base_pars$name == nm]
  if (length(v) != 1 || !is.finite(v)) {
    stop("Input value missing/invalid for: ", nm)
  }
  v
}

# Alias
get_base <- function(nm) {
  get_input_num(nm)
}

# Relative range around a base value
r_rel <- function(base, rel = 0.2) {
  lo <- base * (1 - rel)
  hi <- base * (1 + rel)
  c(min(lo, hi), max(lo, hi))
}

# Clamp fractions to [0,1]
clamp01 <- function(x) max(0, min(1, x))

# Draw from min/max parameters stored directly in the input file
draw_from_input_range <- function(par_name) {
  lo <- get_input_num(paste0(par_name, "_min"))
  hi <- get_input_num(paste0(par_name, "_max"))

  if (!is.finite(lo) || !is.finite(hi)) {
    stop("Non-finite input range for: ", par_name)
  }
  if (lo > hi) {
    stop("Invalid range in input file for: ", par_name, " (min > max)")
  }

  runif(1, min = lo, max = hi)
}

# Name Xsample columns consistently
set_sample_colnames <- function(samples) {
  colnames(samples) <- c(
    "BacNupt","DONupt","denit","DNRA","nitr_NH4","nitr_NO2",
    "biomassprod_nitrif","anammox","biomassprod_anammox","Prod",
    "tDONupt","cOxyupt","cNH4upt","cNO3rel","cNO2upt","CO2rel","N2rel"
  )
  samples
}

# Summarise sampled fluxes into ONE row per accepted model
summarise_flux_samples <- function(samples_df) {
  samples_df %>%
    summarise(
      across(
        everything(),
        list(
          mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
          sd   = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
          q05  = ~as.numeric(quantile(.x, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)),
          q95  = ~as.numeric(quantile(.x, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE))
        )
      )
    )
}

# Append helper: write header only the first time
append_csv <- function(df, file_path) {
  if (!file.exists(file_path)) {
    write.csv(df, file_path, row.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    write.table(
      df,
      file = file_path,
      sep = ",",
      row.names = FALSE,
      col.names = FALSE,
      append = TRUE
    )
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) Save input base parameters
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
write.csv(
  base_pars,
  file.path(out_dir, "BASE_parameters_from_input.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 8) Read ranges and helpers directly from the input file
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CN_Bac_min <- get_input_num("CN_Bac")
CN_Bac_max <- get_input_num("CN_Bac")

CN_DOM_min <- get_input_num("CN_DOM_min")
CN_DOM_max <- get_input_num("CN_DOM_max")

RQ_min <- get_input_num("RQ_min")
RQ_max <- get_input_num("RQ_max")

Oxyupt_min <- get_input_num("Oxyupt_min")
Oxyupt_max <- get_input_num("Oxyupt_max")

DOCupt_min <- get_input_num("DOCupt_min")
DOCupt_max <- get_input_num("DOCupt_max")

NH4upt_min <- get_input_num("NH4upt_min")
NH4upt_max <- get_input_num("NH4upt_max")

NOx_min <- get_input_num("NOx_min")
NOx_max <- get_input_num("NOx_max")

BacCupt_min <- get_input_num("BacCupt_min")
BacCupt_max <- get_input_num("BacCupt_max")

DICrel_min <- get_input_num("DICrel_min")
DICrel_max <- get_input_num("DICrel_max")

orig_NO2 <- get_input_num("orig_NO2")
orig_NO3 <- get_input_num("orig_NO3")

frac_NO2_from_NOx <- abs(orig_NO2) / (abs(orig_NO2) + abs(orig_NO3))
frac_NO3_from_NOx <- abs(orig_NO3) / (abs(orig_NO2) + abs(orig_NO3))

NO2upt_min_est <- NOx_min * frac_NO2_from_NOx
NO2upt_max_est <- NOx_max * frac_NO2_from_NOx

NO3rel_min_est <- NOx_min * frac_NO3_from_NOx
NO3rel_max_est <- NOx_max * frac_NO3_from_NOx

ranges_df <- tibble::tibble(
  model_parameter = c(
    "CN_Bac",
    "CN_DOM",
    "RQ",
    "Oxyupt",
    "DOCupt",
    "BacCupt",
    "NH4upt",
    "NO2upt",
    "NO3rel",
    "DICrel"
  ),
  source_parameter = c(
    "input CN_Bac",
    "input CN_DOM_min/max",
    "input RQ_min/max",
    "input Oxyupt_min/max",
    "input DOCupt_min/max",
    "input BacCupt_min/max",
    "input NH4upt_min/max",
    "input NOx_min/max × frac_NO2_from_NOx",
    "input NOx_min/max × frac_NO3_from_NOx",
    "input DICrel_min/max"
  ),
  min = c(
    CN_Bac_min,
    CN_DOM_min,
    RQ_min,
    Oxyupt_min,
    DOCupt_min,
    BacCupt_min,
    NH4upt_min,
    NO2upt_min_est,
    NO3rel_min_est,
    DICrel_min
  ),
  max = c(
    CN_Bac_max,
    CN_DOM_max,
    RQ_max,
    Oxyupt_max,
    DOCupt_max,
    BacCupt_max,
    NH4upt_max,
    NO2upt_max_est,
    NO3rel_max_est,
    DICrel_max
  )
)

write.csv(
  ranges_df,
  file.path(out_dir, "Input_ranges_used_in_model.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 8B) Progress + logging + incremental save helpers
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

progress_file          <- file.path(out_dir, "progress_log.txt")
status_file            <- file.path(out_dir, "run_status.csv")
accepted_summary_file  <- file.path(out_dir, "accepted_flux_summary.csv")
accepted_par_file      <- file.path(out_dir, "accepted_parameter_sets.csv")
accepted_progress_file <- file.path(out_dir, "accepted_progress.csv")
checkpoint_file        <- file.path(out_dir, "checkpoint_status.rds")

start_time <- Sys.time()

# Initialize status CSV
write.csv(
  data.frame(
    timestamp = as.character(Sys.time()),
    elapsed_min = 0,
    attempted = 0,
    accepted = 0,
    invalid_fraction = 0,
    testsetup_error = 0,
    infeasible = 0,
    pilot_xsample_error = 0,
    full_xsample_error = 0,
    rejected_DIC_pilot = 0,
    rejected_DIC_full = 0,
    acceptance_rate = NA_real_
  ),
  status_file,
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Main progress bar = accepted solutions
pb_accept <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = target_solutions, style = 3)

# In-memory batches to be flushed every SAVE_EVERY accepted solutions
accepted_summary_batch  <- list()
accepted_par_batch      <- list()
accepted_progress_batch <- list()

write_status <- function(force_console = TRUE) {
  elapsed_min <- as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins"))
  acc_rate <- if (n_attempted > 0) n_accepted / n_attempted else NA_real_

  msg <- paste0(
    format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
    " | attempted=", n_attempted,
    " | accepted=", n_accepted,
    " | invalid_fraction=", n_invalid_fraction,
    " | testsetup_error=", n_testsetup_error,
    " | infeasible=", n_infeasible,
    " | rejected_DIC_pilot=", n_rejected_DIC_pilot,
    " | rejected_DIC_full=", n_rejected_DIC_full,
    " | acc_rate=", round(acc_rate, 6),
    " | elapsed_min=", round(elapsed_min, 2)
  )

  if (force_console) {
    cat("\n", msg, "\n", sep = "")
    flush.console()
  }

  write(msg, file = progress_file, append = TRUE)

  write.csv(
    data.frame(
      timestamp = as.character(Sys.time()),
      elapsed_min = round(elapsed_min, 2),
      attempted = n_attempted,
      accepted = n_accepted,
      invalid_fraction = n_invalid_fraction,
      testsetup_error = n_testsetup_error,
      infeasible = n_infeasible,
      pilot_xsample_error = n_pilot_xsample_error,
      full_xsample_error = n_full_xsample_error,
      rejected_DIC_pilot = n_rejected_DIC_pilot,
      rejected_DIC_full = n_rejected_DIC_full,
      acceptance_rate = round(acc_rate, 6)
    ),
    status_file,
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}

flush_batches <- function() {
  if (length(accepted_summary_batch) > 0) {
    append_csv(bind_rows(accepted_summary_batch), accepted_summary_file)
    accepted_summary_batch <<- list()
  }

  if (length(accepted_par_batch) > 0) {
    append_csv(bind_rows(accepted_par_batch), accepted_par_file)
    accepted_par_batch <<- list()
  }

  if (length(accepted_progress_batch) > 0) {
    append_csv(bind_rows(accepted_progress_batch), accepted_progress_file)
    accepted_progress_batch <<- list()
  }
}

save_checkpoint <- function() {
  saveRDS(
    list(
      n_attempted = n_attempted,
      n_accepted = n_accepted,
      n_invalid_fraction = n_invalid_fraction,
      n_testsetup_error = n_testsetup_error,
      n_infeasible = n_infeasible,
      n_pilot_xsample_error = n_pilot_xsample_error,
      n_full_xsample_error = n_full_xsample_error,
      n_rejected_DIC_pilot = n_rejected_DIC_pilot,
      n_rejected_DIC_full = n_rejected_DIC_full,
      seed_used = seed_used,
      run_id = run_id
    ),
    checkpoint_file
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 9) Monte Carlo loop
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
for (i in 1:max_iterations) {

  n_attempted <- n_attempted + 1L

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # heartbeat every STATUS_EVERY attempts
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  if (i %% STATUS_EVERY == 0) {
    write_status(force_console = TRUE)
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # A) Draw random values
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  rr <- r_rel(get_base("CN_Spo"), 0.10)
  tmp_CN_Spo <- runif(1, rr[1], rr[2])

  rr <- r_rel(get_base("fp_N_DOM"), 0.20)
  tmp_fp_N_DOM <- clamp01(runif(1, rr[1], rr[2]))

  rr <- r_rel(get_base("fp_N_Bac"), 0.20)
  tmp_fp_N_Bac <- clamp01(runif(1, rr[1], rr[2]))

  rr <- r_rel(get_base("fp_N_Denit"), 0.20)
  tmp_fp_N_Denit <- clamp01(runif(1, rr[1], rr[2]))

  rr <- r_rel(get_base("fp_N_DNRA"), 0.20)
  tmp_fp_N_DNRA <- clamp01(runif(1, rr[1], rr[2]))

  rr <- r_rel(get_base("Cfix_nit1"), 0.30)
  tmp_Cfix_nit1 <- runif(1, rr[1], rr[2])

  rr <- r_rel(get_base("Cfix_nit2"), 0.30)
  tmp_Cfix_nit2 <- runif(1, rr[1], rr[2])

  rr <- r_rel(get_base("Cfix_ana"), 0.30)
  tmp_Cfix_ana <- runif(1, rr[1], rr[2])

  tmp_CN_Bac  <- runif(1, CN_Bac_min, CN_Bac_max)
  tmp_CN_DOM  <- draw_from_input_range("CN_DOM")
  tmp_RQ      <- draw_from_input_range("RQ")
  tmp_Oxyupt  <- draw_from_input_range("Oxyupt")
  tmp_DOCupt  <- draw_from_input_range("DOCupt")
  tmp_BacCupt <- draw_from_input_range("BacCupt")
  tmp_NH4upt  <- draw_from_input_range("NH4upt")
  tmp_NO2upt  <- runif(1, NO2upt_min_est, NO2upt_max_est)
  tmp_NO3rel  <- runif(1, NO3rel_min_est, NO3rel_max_est)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # B) Build fresh model object
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  rl <- readLIM

  rl <- set_par(rl, "CN_Spo", tmp_CN_Spo)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "NC_Spo", 1 / tmp_CN_Spo)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "CN_DOM", tmp_CN_DOM)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "CN_Bac", tmp_CN_Bac)

  rl <- set_par(rl, "Oxyupt",  tmp_Oxyupt)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "DOCupt",  tmp_DOCupt)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "BacCupt", tmp_BacCupt)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "NH4upt",  tmp_NH4upt)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "NO2upt",  tmp_NO2upt)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "NO3rel",  tmp_NO3rel)

  rl <- set_par(rl, "fp_N_DOM",  tmp_fp_N_DOM)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "fp_N_Bac",  tmp_fp_N_Bac)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "fex_N_DOM", 1 - tmp_fp_N_DOM)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "fex_N_Bac", 1 - tmp_fp_N_Bac)

  rl <- set_par(rl, "fp_N_Denit",  tmp_fp_N_Denit)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "fp_N_DNRA",   tmp_fp_N_DNRA)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "fex_N_Denit", 1 - tmp_fp_N_Denit)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "fex_N_DNRA",  1 - tmp_fp_N_DNRA)

  rl <- set_par(rl, "Cfix_nit1", tmp_Cfix_nit1)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "Cfix_nit2", tmp_Cfix_nit2)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "Cfix_ana",  tmp_Cfix_ana)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "RQ",        tmp_RQ)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # C) Early cheap validity checks BEFORE expensive LIM calls
  #     This is the first layer of "smart feasibility"
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  fr_C_Bac_calc <- 1 - tmp_CN_Spo * tmp_fp_N_Bac / tmp_CN_Bac
  fr_C_DOM_calc <- 1 - tmp_CN_Spo * tmp_fp_N_DOM   / tmp_CN_DOM
  fr_C_Denit_calc <- 1 - tmp_CN_Spo * tmp_fp_N_Denit / tmp_CN_DOM
  fr_C_DNRA_calc  <- 1 - tmp_CN_Spo * tmp_fp_N_DNRA  / tmp_CN_DOM

  all_fracs <- c(fr_C_Bac_calc, fr_C_DOM_calc, fr_C_Denit_calc, fr_C_DNRA_calc)

  # Reject obviously invalid combinations before testsetup/Ldei
  if (any(!is.finite(all_fracs)) || any(all_fracs <= 0)) {
    n_invalid_fraction <- n_invalid_fraction + 1L
    next
  }

  rl <- set_par(rl, "fr_C_Bac",   fr_C_Bac_calc)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "fr_C_DOM",   fr_C_DOM_calc)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "fr_C_Denit", fr_C_Denit_calc)
  rl <- set_par(rl, "fr_C_DNRA",  fr_C_DNRA_calc)

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # D) LIM setup + feasibility check
  #     This is the second layer of "smart feasibility"
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  LIM_loop <- try(testsetup(rl), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(LIM_loop, "try-error")) {
    n_testsetup_error <- n_testsetup_error + 1L
    next
  }

  check_feasible <- try(Ldei(LIM_loop), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(check_feasible, "try-error")) {
    n_infeasible <- n_infeasible + 1L
    next
  }
  if (isTRUE(check_feasible$IsError)) {
    n_infeasible <- n_infeasible + 1L
    next
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # E) CHEAP DIC PRE-CHECK BEFORE FULL Xsample
  #     We do a small pilot sample first.
  #     If even the pilot sample shows no overlap with measured DIC range,
  #     we skip the expensive full Xsample.
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  pilot_samples <- try(Xsample(LIM_loop, iter = pilot_xsample_iter), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(pilot_samples, "try-error")) {
    n_pilot_xsample_error <- n_pilot_xsample_error + 1L
    next
  }

  pilot_samples <- as.data.frame(pilot_samples)
  pilot_samples <- set_sample_colnames(pilot_samples)

  pilot_frac_in_DIC <- mean(
    pilot_samples$CO2rel >= DICrel_min & pilot_samples$CO2rel <= DICrel_max,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  if (!is.finite(pilot_frac_in_DIC) || pilot_frac_in_DIC < min_frac_in_DIC_pilot) {
    n_rejected_DIC_pilot <- n_rejected_DIC_pilot + 1L
    next
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # F) FULL Xsample only for promising models
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  full_samples <- try(Xsample(LIM_loop, iter = full_xsample_iter), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(full_samples, "try-error")) {
    n_full_xsample_error <- n_full_xsample_error + 1L
    next
  }

  full_samples <- as.data.frame(full_samples)
  full_samples <- set_sample_colnames(full_samples)

  full_frac_in_DIC <- mean(
    full_samples$CO2rel >= DICrel_min & full_samples$CO2rel <= DICrel_max,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  if (!is.finite(full_frac_in_DIC) || full_frac_in_DIC < min_frac_in_DIC_full) {
    n_rejected_DIC_full <- n_rejected_DIC_full + 1L
    next
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # G) Accepted model
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  n_accepted <- n_accepted + 1L
  accepted_id <- n_accepted

  # Update progress bar by ACCEPTED solutions
  setTxtProgressBar(pb_accept, n_accepted)

  # Keep only selected parameters that are actually useful later
  par_this <- LIM_loop$Parameters %>%
    select(name, val) %>%
    filter(name %in% c(
      "CN_DOM", "CN_Spo", "DOCupt", "BacCupt", "Oxyupt", "NH4upt",
      "NO2upt", "NO3rel", "fr_C_DOM", "fr_C_Bac", "fr_C_Denit", "fr_C_DNRA",
      "fp_N_DOM", "fp_N_Denit", "fp_N_DNRA"
    )) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = name, values_from = val) %>%
    mutate(
      accepted_id = accepted_id,
      fp_C_DOM   = 1 - fr_C_DOM,
      fp_C_Bac   = 1 - fr_C_Bac,
      fp_C_Denit = 1 - fr_C_Denit,
      fp_C_DNRA  = 1 - fr_C_DNRA
    ) %>%
    select(accepted_id, everything())

  # Summarise full Xsample into ONE row
  flux_this <- summarise_flux_samples(full_samples) %>%
    mutate(
      accepted_id = accepted_id,
      attempt_id = n_attempted,
      pilot_frac_in_DIC = pilot_frac_in_DIC,
      full_frac_in_DIC = full_frac_in_DIC
    ) %>%
    select(accepted_id, attempt_id, pilot_frac_in_DIC, full_frac_in_DIC, everything())

  # Save acceptance progress as one row per accepted model
  accepted_progress_this <- tibble(
    accepted_id = accepted_id,
    attempt_id = n_attempted,
    pilot_frac_in_DIC = pilot_frac_in_DIC,
    full_frac_in_DIC = full_frac_in_DIC,
    timestamp = as.character(Sys.time())
  )

  accepted_par_batch[[length(accepted_par_batch) + 1]] <- par_this
  accepted_summary_batch[[length(accepted_summary_batch) + 1]] <- flux_this
  accepted_progress_batch[[length(accepted_progress_batch) + 1]] <- accepted_progress_this

  if (n_accepted %% 10 == 0) {
    cat("\nAccepted solutions found:", n_accepted,
        "| Attempts so far:", n_attempted, "\n")
    flush.console()
  }

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # H) Flush to disk every SAVE_EVERY accepted solutions
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  if (n_accepted %% SAVE_EVERY == 0) {
    flush_batches()
    write_status(force_console = TRUE)
    save_checkpoint()
  }

  # Stop early if enough accepted solutions were found
  if (n_accepted >= target_solutions) break
}

close(pb_accept)

# Final flush
flush_batches()
write_status(force_console = TRUE)
save_checkpoint()

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10) Read saved outputs
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (!file.exists(accepted_par_file) || !file.exists(accepted_summary_file)) {
  stop("No accepted solutions were saved to disk.")
}

par_saved  <- read.csv(accepted_par_file)
flux_saved <- read.csv(accepted_summary_file)

n_accepted_final <- length(unique(par_saved$accepted_id))

if (n_accepted_final == 0) {
  stop("No accepted solutions remained after full DIC filter.")
}

acc_rate <- n_accepted / n_attempted

cat(
  "\nFINAL SUMMARY\n",
  "Attempts:", n_attempted,
  "| Accepted:", n_accepted,
  "| Acceptance rate:", round(acc_rate, 6), "\n"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 11) Build final model-level output table
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Because we already saved ONE summary row per accepted model,
# there is no need to average across thousands of raw draws later.
output2 <- flux_saved %>%
  left_join(par_saved, by = "accepted_id")

write.csv(
  output2,
  file.path(out_dir, "accepted_model_level_output.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 12) Save run metadata and QC
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
qc_txt <- file.path(out_dir, "QC_run_info.txt")
writeLines(
  c(
    paste0("input_file: ", file),
    paste0("run_id: ", run_id),
    paste0("seed: ", seed_used),
    paste0("max_iterations: ", max_iterations),
    paste0("target_solutions: ", target_solutions),
    paste0("pilot_xsample_iter: ", pilot_xsample_iter),
    paste0("full_xsample_iter: ", full_xsample_iter),
    paste0("SAVE_EVERY: ", SAVE_EVERY),
    paste0("STATUS_EVERY: ", STATUS_EVERY),
    paste0("min_frac_in_DIC_pilot: ", min_frac_in_DIC_pilot),
    paste0("min_frac_in_DIC_full: ", min_frac_in_DIC_full),
    "",
    paste0("attempted: ", n_attempted),
    paste0("accepted: ", n_accepted),
    paste0("acceptance_rate: ", round(acc_rate, 6)),
    paste0("invalid_fraction: ", n_invalid_fraction),
    paste0("testsetup_error: ", n_testsetup_error),
    paste0("infeasible: ", n_infeasible),
    paste0("pilot_xsample_error: ", n_pilot_xsample_error),
    paste0("full_xsample_error: ", n_full_xsample_error),
    paste0("rejected_DIC_pilot: ", n_rejected_DIC_pilot),
    paste0("rejected_DIC_full: ", n_rejected_DIC_full),
    paste0("DICrel_min: ", DICrel_min),
    paste0("DICrel_max: ", DICrel_max),
    "",
    "Input-derived ranges used:",
    capture.output(print(ranges_df))
  ),
  con = qc_txt
)

sink(file.path(out_dir, "sessionInfo.txt"))
print(sessionInfo())
sink()

cat("\nSuccess! Outputs saved to:\n", out_dir, "\n")

```


### Build summary tables from ACCEPTED model outputs

```{r, fig.width=15,fig.height=10}
# ==============================================================================
# Build summary tables from ACCEPTED flux samples + parameter sets
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Build paper-style summary tables from:
#   1) accepted_flux_samples.csv
#   2) accepted_parameter_sets.csv
#   3) Input_ranges_used_in_model.csv
#
# IMPORTANT
# In this run structure:
# - accepted_flux_samples.csv contains all Xsample draws
# - accepted_parameter_sets.csv is saved in LONG format:
#     accepted_id, name, val
# - therefore we must:
#     a) rebuild the parameter table to WIDE format
#     b) average fluxes within each accepted_id
#     c) join parameters + model-level means
# ==============================================================================

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(openxlsx)
library(stringr)

# ==============================================================================
# 0) USER INPUT
# ==============================================================================
run_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260512_162324"

flux_file   <- file.path(run_dir, "accepted_flux_samples.csv")
param_file  <- file.path(run_dir, "accepted_parameter_sets.csv")
ranges_file <- file.path(run_dir, "Input_ranges_used_in_model.csv")

output_dir <- file.path(run_dir, "tables_from_accepted_outputs")
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# ==============================================================================
# 1) CHECK FILES
# ==============================================================================
if (!file.exists(flux_file)) {
  stop("Flux samples file does not exist:\n", flux_file)
}

if (!file.exists(param_file)) {
  stop("Parameter file does not exist:\n", param_file)
}

if (!file.exists(ranges_file)) {
  stop("Ranges file does not exist:\n", ranges_file)
}

# ==============================================================================
# 2) READ FILES
# ==============================================================================
df_flux_raw <- read_csv(flux_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
df_par_raw  <- read_csv(param_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
ranges_df   <- read_csv(ranges_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

if (nrow(df_flux_raw) == 0) stop("accepted_flux_samples.csv has 0 rows.")
if (nrow(df_par_raw)  == 0) stop("accepted_parameter_sets.csv has 0 rows.")
if (nrow(ranges_df)   == 0) stop("Input_ranges_used_in_model.csv has 0 rows.")

# ==============================================================================
# 3) REQUIRED COLUMNS CHECK
# ==============================================================================
required_flux_cols <- c(
  "accepted_id", "xsample_draw",
  "BacNupt", "DONupt", "denit", "DNRA", "nitr_NH4", "nitr_NO2",
  "biomassprod_nitrif", "anammox", "biomassprod_anammox", "Prod",
  "tDONupt", "cOxyupt", "cNH4upt", "cNO3rel", "cNO2upt", "CO2rel", "N2rel"
)

missing_flux_cols <- setdiff(required_flux_cols, names(df_flux_raw))
if (length(missing_flux_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing required columns in accepted_flux_samples.csv:\n",
    paste(missing_flux_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

required_par_long_cols <- c("accepted_id", "name", "val")
missing_par_long_cols <- setdiff(required_par_long_cols, names(df_par_raw))
if (length(missing_par_long_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    "accepted_parameter_sets.csv must contain:\n",
    paste(required_par_long_cols, collapse = ", "),
    "\nMissing:\n",
    paste(missing_par_long_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

# ==============================================================================
# 4) REBUILD PARAMETER TABLE TO WIDE FORMAT
# ==============================================================================
df_par <- df_par_raw %>%
  mutate(val = as.numeric(val)) %>%
  select(accepted_id, name, val) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = name, values_from = val) %>%
  mutate(
    fp_C_DOM   = 1 - fr_C_DOM,
    fp_C_Bac   = 1 - fr_C_Bac,
    fp_C_Denit = 1 - fr_C_Denit,
    fp_C_DNRA  = 1 - fr_C_DNRA
  )

required_par_cols <- c(
  "accepted_id",
  "Oxyupt", "NH4upt", "NO2upt", "NO3rel", "DOCupt", "BacCupt",
  "CN_Spo", "CN_DOM",
  "fp_N_DOM", "fp_N_Denit", "fp_N_DNRA",
  "fr_C_Denit", "fr_C_DNRA",
  "fp_C_DOM", "fp_C_Denit", "fp_C_DNRA"
)

missing_par_cols <- setdiff(required_par_cols, names(df_par))
if (length(missing_par_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing required columns in rebuilt parameter table:\n",
    paste(missing_par_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

write_csv(
  df_par,
  file.path(output_dir, "accepted_parameter_sets_wide_rebuilt.csv")
)

# ==============================================================================
# 5) HELPER FUNCTIONS
# ==============================================================================
safe_mean <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(NA_real_)
  mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

safe_sd <- function(x) {
  if (sum(!is.na(x)) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

safe_min <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(NA_real_)
  min(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

safe_max <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(NA_real_)
  max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

safe_q <- function(x, prob) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(quantile(x, probs = prob, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE))
}

safe_median <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(NA_real_)
  median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

n_non_na <- function(x) {
  sum(!is.na(x))
}

fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 2) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(x),
    NA_character_,
    format(round(x, digits), nsmall = digits, trim = TRUE)
  )
}

mean_sd_str <- function(x, digits_mean = 2, digits_sd = 2) {
  m <- safe_mean(x)
  s <- safe_sd(x)
  if (is.na(m) || is.na(s)) return(NA_character_)
  paste0(
    format(round(m, digits_mean), nsmall = digits_mean, trim = TRUE),
    " ± ",
    format(round(s, digits_sd), nsmall = digits_sd, trim = TRUE)
  )
}

median_q_str <- function(x, digits = 2) {
  med <- safe_median(x)
  q05 <- safe_q(x, 0.05)
  q95 <- safe_q(x, 0.95)
  if (is.na(med) || is.na(q05) || is.na(q95)) return(NA_character_)
  paste0(
    fmt_num(med, digits), " [",
    fmt_num(q05, digits), "–",
    fmt_num(q95, digits), "]"
  )
}

safe_div <- function(num, den, min_den = 1e-8) {
  out <- ifelse(is.na(den) | abs(den) < min_den, NA_real_, num / den)
  out[!is.finite(out)] <- NA_real_
  out
}

ratio_of_sums <- function(num, den, multiplier = 1, min_den = 1e-8) {
  s_num <- sum(num, na.rm = TRUE)
  s_den <- sum(den, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.na(s_den) || abs(s_den) < min_den) return(NA_real_)
  multiplier * s_num / s_den
}

ratio_summary <- function(num, den, multiplier = 100, min_den = 1e-8) {
  r <- safe_div(num, den, min_den = min_den)

  tibble(
    N_valid       = sum(!is.na(r)),
    Ratio_of_sums = ratio_of_sums(num, den, multiplier = multiplier, min_den = min_den),
    Mean_ratio    = if (all(is.na(r))) NA_real_ else multiplier * mean(r, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD_ratio      = if (sum(!is.na(r)) < 2) NA_real_ else multiplier * sd(r, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_ratio  = if (all(is.na(r))) NA_real_ else multiplier * median(r, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q05_ratio     = if (all(is.na(r))) NA_real_ else multiplier * safe_q(r, 0.05),
    Q95_ratio     = if (all(is.na(r))) NA_real_ else multiplier * safe_q(r, 0.95)
  )
}

# ==============================================================================
# 6) REBUILD MODEL-LEVEL OUTPUT FROM RAW XSAMPLE DRAWS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# One row per accepted_id:
# - average fluxes across xsample draws
# - join accepted parameter values
# ==============================================================================
df_model <- df_flux_raw %>%
  group_by(accepted_id) %>%
  summarise(
    BacNupt_mean             = mean(BacNupt, na.rm = TRUE),
    DONupt_mean              = mean(DONupt, na.rm = TRUE),
    denit_mean               = mean(denit, na.rm = TRUE),
    DNRA_mean                = mean(DNRA, na.rm = TRUE),
    nitr_NH4_mean            = mean(nitr_NH4, na.rm = TRUE),
    nitr_NO2_mean            = mean(nitr_NO2, na.rm = TRUE),
    biomassprod_nitrif_mean  = mean(biomassprod_nitrif, na.rm = TRUE),
    anammox_mean             = mean(anammox, na.rm = TRUE),
    biomassprod_anammox_mean = mean(biomassprod_anammox, na.rm = TRUE),
    Prod_mean                = mean(Prod, na.rm = TRUE),
    tDONupt_mean             = mean(tDONupt, na.rm = TRUE),
    cOxyupt_mean             = mean(cOxyupt, na.rm = TRUE),
    cNH4upt_mean             = mean(cNH4upt, na.rm = TRUE),
    cNO3rel_mean             = mean(cNO3rel, na.rm = TRUE),
    cNO2upt_mean             = mean(cNO2upt, na.rm = TRUE),
    CO2rel_mean              = mean(CO2rel, na.rm = TRUE),
    N2rel_mean               = mean(N2rel, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(df_par, by = "accepted_id")

if (nrow(df_model) == 0) {
  stop("No model-level rows could be rebuilt.")
}

write_csv(
  df_model,
  file.path(output_dir, "accepted_model_level_output_rebuilt.csv")
)

# ==============================================================================
# 7) REBUILD DERIVED FLUX COLUMNS
# ==============================================================================
df_flux <- df_model %>%
  mutate(
    BacNupt = BacNupt_mean,
    DONupt  = DONupt_mean,
    denit   = denit_mean,
    DNRA    = DNRA_mean,
    nitr_NH4 = nitr_NH4_mean,
    nitr_NO2 = nitr_NO2_mean,
    biomassprod_nitrif  = biomassprod_nitrif_mean,
    anammox             = anammox_mean,
    biomassprod_anammox = biomassprod_anammox_mean,
    Prod   = Prod_mean,
    CO2rel = CO2rel_mean,
    N2rel  = N2rel_mean,

    r10_totCprod   = Prod_mean * CN_Spo,
    r2_CProd_DOC   = DONupt_mean * CN_DOM * fp_C_DOM,
    r3_CProd_denit = denit_mean  * CN_DOM * fp_C_Denit,
    r4_CProd_DNRA  = DNRA_mean   * CN_DOM * fp_C_DNRA
  )

# ==============================================================================
# 8) PARAMETER SUMMARY
# ==============================================================================
target_params <- c(
  "CN_Spo", "CN_DOM",
  "fp_N_DOM", "fp_N_Denit", "fp_N_DNRA",
  "fr_C_Denit", "fr_C_DNRA",
  "fp_C_DOM", "fp_C_Denit", "fp_C_DNRA",
  "Oxyupt", "NH4upt", "NO2upt", "NO3rel", "DOCupt", "BacCupt"
)

param_summary <- tibble(parameter = target_params) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    N_nonNA = n_non_na(df_par[[parameter]]),
    Mean = safe_mean(df_par[[parameter]]),
    SD   = safe_sd(df_par[[parameter]]),
    Min  = safe_min(df_par[[parameter]]),
    Max  = safe_max(df_par[[parameter]]),
    Q05  = safe_q(df_par[[parameter]], 0.05),
    Q95  = safe_q(df_par[[parameter]], 0.95),
    `Mean ± SD` = paste0(fmt_num(Mean, 3), " ± ", fmt_num(SD, 3)),
    `Median [Q05–Q95]` = median_q_str(df_par[[parameter]], digits = 3),
    source_used = "accepted_parameter_sets"
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ranges_used_tbl <- ranges_df %>%
  transmute(
    parameter = model_parameter,
    range_min_used = min,
    range_max_used = max,
    source_parameter = source_parameter
  )

table2_parameters_like <- param_summary %>%
  left_join(ranges_used_tbl, by = "parameter") %>%
  select(
    parameter, N_nonNA,
    Mean, SD, Min, Max, Q05, Q95,
    range_min_used, range_max_used, source_parameter,
    source_used,
    `Mean ± SD`, `Median [Q05–Q95]`
  )

# ==============================================================================
# 9) TABLE 1-LIKE: EXTERNAL / CONSTRAINED FLUXES
# ==============================================================================
table1_map <- tibble(
  Flux = c(
    "Bacteria-C assimilation (r1_C proxy)",
    "Bacteria-N assimilation (r1_N proxy)",
    "Dissolved organic carbon, DOC (r11_C)",
    "Dissolved organic nitrogen, DON (r11_N)",
    "O2 uptake (r12)",
    "NH4 exchange (r13)",
    "NO3 release (r14)",
    "NO2 exchange (r15)"
  ),
  Units = c(
    "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",
    "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",
    "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",
    "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",
    "µmol O2 cm^-3 day^-1",
    "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",
    "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",
    "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1"
  ),
  col = c("BacCupt", "BacNupt", "DOCupt", "DONupt", "Oxyupt", "NH4upt", "NO3rel", "NO2upt")
)

table1_like <- table1_map %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    N_nonNA = n_non_na(df_flux[[col]]),
    Mean = safe_mean(df_flux[[col]]),
    SD   = safe_sd(df_flux[[col]]),
    Min  = safe_min(df_flux[[col]]),
    Max  = safe_max(df_flux[[col]]),
    Q05  = safe_q(df_flux[[col]], 0.05),
    Q95  = safe_q(df_flux[[col]], 0.95),
    `Mean ± SD` = mean_sd_str(df_flux[[col]], digits_mean = 2, digits_sd = 2),
    `Median [Q05–Q95]` = median_q_str(df_flux[[col]], digits = 2)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Flux, Units, N_nonNA, Mean, SD, Min, Max, Q05, Q95, `Mean ± SD`, `Median [Q05–Q95]`)

# ==============================================================================
# 10) TABLE 2-LIKE: REACTION OVERVIEW
# ==============================================================================
table2_like <- tribble(
  ~r,   ~Description,                    ~Primary_output_column, ~Process_group,
  "r1", "Bacteria consumption",          "BacNupt / BacCupt",    "Aerobic consumption",
  "r2", "DOM consumption",               "DONupt / DOCupt",      "Aerobic consumption",
  "r3", "Denitrification",               "denit",                "Anaerobic consumption",
  "r4", "DNRA",                          "DNRA",                 "Anaerobic consumption",
  "r5", "NH4 oxidation",                 "nitr_NH4",             "Chemoautotrophy",
  "r6", "NO2 oxidation",                 "nitr_NO2",             "Chemoautotrophy",
  "r7", "Production from nitrification", "biomassprod_nitrif",   "Stoichiometric coupling",
  "r8", "Anammox",                       "anammox",              "Chemoautotrophy",
  "r9", "Production from anammox",       "biomassprod_anammox",  "Stoichiometric coupling",
  "r10","Production",                    "Prod / r10_totCprod",  "Closure term",
  "r11","Total DOM uptake",              "DONupt / DOCupt",      "Exchange",
  "r12","Oxygen uptake",                 "Oxyupt",               "Exchange",
  "r13","NH4 exchange",                  "NH4upt",               "Exchange",
  "r14","NO3 release",                   "NO3rel",               "Exchange",
  "r15","NO2 exchange",                  "NO2upt",               "Exchange",
  "r16","CO2 release",                   "CO2rel",               "Exchange",
  "r17","N2 release",                    "N2rel",                "Exchange"
) %>%
  mutate(
    Comment = c(
      "Coupled to bacterial stoichiometry and model closure",
      "Coupled to CN_DOM and DOM partitioning",
      "Coupled to CN_DOM and denitrification partitioning",
      "Coupled to CN_DOM and DNRA partitioning",
      "Stoichiometric O2 demand",
      "Stoichiometric O2 demand",
      "Nitrification-linked production",
      "Anaerobic ammonium oxidation",
      "Anammox-linked production",
      "Holobiont production",
      "External DOM constraint",
      "External O2 constraint",
      "External NH4 constraint",
      "External NO3 constraint",
      "External NO2 constraint",
      "External CO2 release",
      "External N2 release"
    )
  )

# ==============================================================================
# 11) TABLE 3-LIKE: MODEL FLUXES
# ==============================================================================
table3_fluxes_spec <- tribble(
  ~Metric,                                  ~Units,                   ~Currency, ~col,
  "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",             "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",   "C",       "BacCupt",
  "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",             "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "BacNupt",
  "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)", "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1", "C",     "DOCupt",
  "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)", "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1", "N",     "DONupt",
  "Denitrification (r3)",                   "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",   "C",       "r3_CProd_denit",
  "Denitrification (r3)",                   "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "denit",
  "DNRA (r4)",                              "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",   "C",       "r4_CProd_DNRA",
  "DNRA (r4)",                              "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "DNRA",
  "NH4 oxidation (r5)",                     "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "nitr_NH4",
  "NO2 oxidation (r6)",                     "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "nitr_NO2",
  "Production - nitrification (r7)",        "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",   "C",       "biomassprod_nitrif",
  "Production - nitrification (r7)",        "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "biomassprod_nitrif",
  "Anammox (r8)",                           "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "anammox",
  "Production - anammox (r9)",              "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",   "C",       "biomassprod_anammox",
  "Production - anammox (r9)",              "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "biomassprod_anammox",
  "Production (r10)",                       "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",   "C",       "r10_totCprod",
  "Production (r10)",                       "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "Prod",
  "Total DOM uptake (r11)",                 "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",   "C",       "DOCupt",
  "Total DOM uptake (r11)",                 "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "DONupt",
  "Oxygen uptake (r12)",                    "µmol O2 cm^-3 day^-1",  "O2",      "Oxyupt",
  "NH4 exchange (r13)",                     "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "NH4upt",
  "NO3 release (r14)",                      "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "NO3rel",
  "NO2 exchange (r15)",                     "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "NO2upt",
  "CO2 release (r16)",                      "µmol C cm^-3 day^-1",   "C",       "CO2rel",
  "N2 release (r17)",                       "µmol N cm^-3 day^-1",   "N",       "N2rel"
)

table3_fluxes_like <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(table3_fluxes_spec)), function(i) {
  spec_row <- table3_fluxes_spec[i, ]
  vals <- df_flux[[spec_row$col]]

  if (spec_row$Metric == "Production - nitrification (r7)" && spec_row$Currency == "C") {
    vals <- df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif * df_flux$CN_Spo
  }

  if (spec_row$Metric == "Production - anammox (r9)" && spec_row$Currency == "C") {
    vals <- df_flux$biomassprod_anammox * df_flux$CN_Spo
  }

  tibble(
    Metric = spec_row$Metric,
    Units = spec_row$Units,
    Currency = spec_row$Currency,
    Source_column = spec_row$col,
    N_nonNA = n_non_na(vals),
    Mean = safe_mean(vals),
    SD   = safe_sd(vals),
    Min  = safe_min(vals),
    Max  = safe_max(vals),
    Q05  = safe_q(vals, 0.05),
    Q95  = safe_q(vals, 0.95),
    `Mean ± SD` = mean_sd_str(vals, digits_mean = 3, digits_sd = 3),
    `Median [Q05–Q95]` = median_q_str(vals, digits = 3)
  )
}))

# ==============================================================================
# 12) TABLE 3-LIKE: FRACTIONS / EFFICIENCIES
# ==============================================================================
nitrif_total_N <- df_flux$nitr_NH4 + df_flux$nitr_NO2

microbial_prod_C <- df_flux$r2_CProd_DOC +
  df_flux$r3_CProd_denit +
  df_flux$r4_CProd_DNRA +
  (df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif + df_flux$biomassprod_anammox) * df_flux$CN_Spo

microbial_prod_N <- safe_div(
  df_flux$r2_CProd_DOC + df_flux$r3_CProd_denit + df_flux$r4_CProd_DNRA,
  df_flux$CN_Spo
) + df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif + df_flux$biomassprod_anammox

chemoauto_prod_C <- (df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif + df_flux$biomassprod_anammox) * df_flux$CN_Spo
chemoauto_prod_N <- df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif + df_flux$biomassprod_anammox

table3_fractions_like <- bind_rows(
  ratio_summary(df_flux$r2_CProd_DOC, df_flux$DOCupt, multiplier = 100) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Production efficiency on DOC (C)", Units = "%"),

  ratio_summary(df_flux$r10_totCprod, df_flux$DOCupt + df_flux$BacCupt, multiplier = 100) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Production efficiency (total input) (C)", Units = "%"),

  ratio_summary(df_flux$Prod, df_flux$DONupt + df_flux$BacNupt, multiplier = 100) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Production efficiency (total input) (N)", Units = "%"),

  ratio_summary(microbial_prod_C, df_flux$r10_totCprod, multiplier = 100) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Fraction microbial production to total production (C)", Units = "%"),

  ratio_summary(microbial_prod_N, df_flux$Prod, multiplier = 100) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Fraction microbial production to total production (N)", Units = "%"),

  ratio_summary(chemoauto_prod_C, df_flux$r10_totCprod, multiplier = 100) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Fraction chemoautotrophy to total production (C)", Units = "%"),

  ratio_summary(chemoauto_prod_N, df_flux$Prod, multiplier = 100) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Fraction chemoautotrophy to total production (N)", Units = "%"),

  ratio_summary(df_flux$denit, nitrif_total_N, multiplier = 100, min_den = 1e-4) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Fraction denitrification to nitrification", Units = "%"),

  ratio_summary(df_flux$DNRA, nitrif_total_N, multiplier = 100, min_den = 1e-4) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Fraction DNRA to nitrification", Units = "%"),

  ratio_summary(df_flux$CO2rel, df_flux$Oxyupt, multiplier = 1) %>%
    mutate(Metric = "Apparent CO2:O2 exchange ratio", Units = "-")
) %>%
  mutate(
    `Mean ± SD` = paste0(fmt_num(Mean_ratio, 2), " ± ", fmt_num(SD_ratio, 2)),
    `Median [Q05–Q95]` = paste0(
      fmt_num(Median_ratio, 2), " [",
      fmt_num(Q05_ratio, 2), "–",
      fmt_num(Q95_ratio, 2), "]"
    ),
    Ratio_of_sums = round(Ratio_of_sums, 2),
    Mean_ratio    = round(Mean_ratio, 2),
    SD_ratio      = round(SD_ratio, 2),
    Median_ratio  = round(Median_ratio, 2),
    Q05_ratio     = round(Q05_ratio, 2),
    Q95_ratio     = round(Q95_ratio, 2)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Metric, Units, N_valid,
    Ratio_of_sums, Mean_ratio, SD_ratio,
    Median_ratio, Q05_ratio, Q95_ratio,
    `Mean ± SD`, `Median [Q05–Q95]`
  )


# ==============================================================================
# 12B) EXTRA SUMMARY TABLE WITH TRUE CI95%
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# New additional table only
# Does NOT replace existing tables
# Columns:
# Parameter, C/N/O2/%, n, Mean, Median, SD, CI95%, Min, Max
# ==============================================================================

# ---- helper: CI95 half-width ----
safe_ci95_half <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  n <- length(x)

  if (n < 2) return(NA_real_)

  s <- sd(x)
  se <- s / sqrt(n)
  tcrit <- qt(0.975, df = n - 1)

  se * tcrit
}

# ---- helper: summary row ----
make_summary_row <- function(parameter_name, currency_label, values) {
  values <- values[!is.na(values)]
  n <- length(values)

  mean_val   <- if (n == 0) NA_real_ else mean(values)
  median_val <- if (n == 0) NA_real_ else median(values)
  sd_val     <- if (n < 2)  NA_real_ else sd(values)
  ci95_half  <- safe_ci95_half(values)
  min_val    <- if (n == 0) NA_real_ else min(values)
  max_val    <- if (n == 0) NA_real_ else max(values)

  tibble(
    Parameter = parameter_name,
    `C/N/O2/%` = currency_label,
    n = n,
    Mean = mean_val,
    Median = median_val,
    SD = sd_val,
    `CI95%` = ci95_half,
    Min = min_val,
    Max = max_val
  )
}

# ---- define exactly the rows you want ----
extra_table_spec <- tribble(
  ~Parameter,                                           ~Currency, ~Type,        ~col,
  "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",                         "C",       "direct",     "BacCupt",
  "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",         "C",       "direct",     "DOCupt",
  "Denitrification (r3)",                               "C",       "direct",     "r3_CProd_denit",
  "DNRA (r4)",                                          "C",       "direct",     "r4_CProd_DNRA",
  "Production - nitrification (r7)",                    "C",       "calc",       "prod_nitrif_C",
  "Production - anammox (r9)",                          "C",       "calc",       "prod_anammox_C",
  "Production (r10)",                                   "C",       "direct",     "r10_totCprod",
  "Total DOM uptake (r11)",                             "C",       "direct",     "DOCupt",
  "CO2 release (r16)",                                  "C",       "direct",     "CO2rel",

  "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",                         "N",       "direct",     "BacNupt",
  "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",         "N",       "direct",     "DONupt",
  "Denitrification (r3)",                               "N",       "direct",     "denit",
  "DNRA (r4)",                                          "N",       "direct",     "DNRA",
  "NH4 oxidation (r5)",                                 "N",       "direct",     "nitr_NH4",
  "NO2 oxidation (r6)",                                 "N",       "direct",     "nitr_NO2",
  "Production - nitrification (r7)",                    "N",       "direct",     "biomassprod_nitrif",
  "Anammox (r8)",                                       "N",       "direct",     "anammox",
  "Production - anammox (r9)",                          "N",       "direct",     "biomassprod_anammox",
  "Production (r10)",                                   "N",       "direct",     "Prod",
  "Total DOM uptake (r11)",                             "N",       "direct",     "DONupt",
  "NH4 exchange (r13)",                                 "N",       "direct",     "NH4upt",
  "NO3 release (r14)",                                  "N",       "direct",     "NO3rel",
  "NO2 exchange (r15)",                                 "N",       "direct",     "NO2upt",
  "N2 release (r17)",                                   "N",       "direct",     "N2rel",

  "Oxygen uptake (r12)",                                "O2",      "direct",     "Oxyupt",

  "Production efficiency on DOC (C)",                   "%",       "ratio_pct",  "prod_eff_doc_c",
  "Production efficiency (total input) (C)",            "%",       "ratio_pct",  "prod_eff_total_c",
  "Production efficiency (total input) (N)",            "%",       "ratio_pct",  "prod_eff_total_n",
  "Fraction microbial production to total production (C)", "%",     "ratio_pct",  "frac_microbial_c",
  "Fraction microbial production to total production (N)", "%",     "ratio_pct",  "frac_microbial_n",
  "Fraction chemoautotrophy to total production (C)",   "%",       "ratio_pct",  "frac_chemo_c",
  "Fraction chemoautotrophy to total production (N)",   "%",       "ratio_pct",  "frac_chemo_n",
  "Fraction denitrification to nitrification",          "%",       "ratio_pct",  "frac_denit_to_nitrif",
  "Fraction DNRA to nitrification",                     "%",       "ratio_pct",  "frac_dnra_to_nitrif",
  "Apparent CO2:O2 exchange ratio",                     "%",       "ratio_raw",  "co2_o2_ratio"
)

# ---- build vectors for all requested metrics ----
nitrif_total_N <- df_flux$nitr_NH4 + df_flux$nitr_NO2

microbial_prod_C <- df_flux$r2_CProd_DOC +
  df_flux$r3_CProd_denit +
  df_flux$r4_CProd_DNRA +
  (df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif + df_flux$biomassprod_anammox) * df_flux$CN_Spo

microbial_prod_N <- safe_div(
  df_flux$r2_CProd_DOC + df_flux$r3_CProd_denit + df_flux$r4_CProd_DNRA,
  df_flux$CN_Spo
) + df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif + df_flux$biomassprod_anammox

chemoauto_prod_C <- (df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif + df_flux$biomassprod_anammox) * df_flux$CN_Spo
chemoauto_prod_N <- df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif + df_flux$biomassprod_anammox

extra_value_list <- list(
  BacCupt = df_flux$BacCupt,
  DOCupt = df_flux$DOCupt,
  r3_CProd_denit = df_flux$r3_CProd_denit,
  r4_CProd_DNRA = df_flux$r4_CProd_DNRA,
  prod_nitrif_C = df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif * df_flux$CN_Spo,
  prod_anammox_C = df_flux$biomassprod_anammox * df_flux$CN_Spo,
  r10_totCprod = df_flux$r10_totCprod,
  CO2rel = df_flux$CO2rel,

  BacNupt = df_flux$BacNupt,
  DONupt = df_flux$DONupt,
  denit = df_flux$denit,
  DNRA = df_flux$DNRA,
  nitr_NH4 = df_flux$nitr_NH4,
  nitr_NO2 = df_flux$nitr_NO2,
  biomassprod_nitrif = df_flux$biomassprod_nitrif,
  anammox = df_flux$anammox,
  biomassprod_anammox = df_flux$biomassprod_anammox,
  Prod = df_flux$Prod,
  NH4upt = df_flux$NH4upt,
  NO3rel = df_flux$NO3rel,
  NO2upt = df_flux$NO2upt,
  N2rel = df_flux$N2rel,

  Oxyupt = df_flux$Oxyupt,

  prod_eff_doc_c = safe_div(df_flux$r2_CProd_DOC, df_flux$DOCupt) * 100,
  prod_eff_total_c = safe_div(df_flux$r10_totCprod, df_flux$DOCupt + df_flux$BacCupt) * 100,
  prod_eff_total_n = safe_div(df_flux$Prod, df_flux$DONupt + df_flux$BacNupt) * 100,
  frac_microbial_c = safe_div(microbial_prod_C, df_flux$r10_totCprod) * 100,
  frac_microbial_n = safe_div(microbial_prod_N, df_flux$Prod) * 100,
  frac_chemo_c = safe_div(chemoauto_prod_C, df_flux$r10_totCprod) * 100,
  frac_chemo_n = safe_div(chemoauto_prod_N, df_flux$Prod) * 100,
  frac_denit_to_nitrif = safe_div(df_flux$denit, nitrif_total_N, min_den = 1e-4) * 100,
  frac_dnra_to_nitrif = safe_div(df_flux$DNRA, nitrif_total_N, min_den = 1e-4) * 100,
  co2_o2_ratio = safe_div(df_flux$CO2rel, df_flux$Oxyupt)
)

# ---- build final extra table ----
extra_summary_table <- bind_rows(
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(extra_table_spec)), function(i) {
    this_row <- extra_table_spec[i, ]
    vals <- extra_value_list[[this_row$col]]

    make_summary_row(
      parameter_name = this_row$Parameter,
      currency_label = this_row$Currency,
      values = vals
    )
  })
) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(Mean, Median, SD, `CI95%`, Min, Max), ~ round(.x, 3))
  )

# ---- save CSV ----
write_csv(
  extra_summary_table,
  file.path(output_dir, "Table_extra_selected_parameters_with_CI95.csv")
)

# ---- optional: add to workbook too ----
xlsx_file <- file.path(output_dir, "Summary_tables_from_accepted_outputs.xlsx")

# If workbook already exists, load it; otherwise create a new one
if (file.exists(xlsx_file)) {
  wb <- loadWorkbook(xlsx_file)
} else {
  wb <- createWorkbook()
}

# Add sheet only if it does not already exist
if (!"Extra_CI95_table" %in% names(wb)) {
  addWorksheet(wb, "Extra_CI95_table")
}

# Write the table into the sheet
writeData(wb, sheet = "Extra_CI95_table", x = extra_summary_table)

# Save workbook
saveWorkbook(wb, xlsx_file, overwrite = TRUE)

# ==============================================================================
# 13) SAVE CSV FILES
# ==============================================================================
write_csv(df_model,               file.path(output_dir, "accepted_model_level_output_rebuilt.csv"))
write_csv(table1_like,            file.path(output_dir, "Table1_like_measured_constraints.csv"))
write_csv(table2_like,            file.path(output_dir, "Table2_like_reactions_overview.csv"))
write_csv(table2_parameters_like, file.path(output_dir, "Table2_like_parameters_summary.csv"))
write_csv(table3_fluxes_like,     file.path(output_dir, "Table3_like_model_fluxes.csv"))
write_csv(table3_fractions_like,  file.path(output_dir, "Table3_like_fractions_efficiencies.csv"))

# ==============================================================================
# 14) SAVE EXCEL
# ==============================================================================
wb <- createWorkbook()

header_style <- createStyle(
  textDecoration = "bold",
  halign = "center",
  border = "Bottom"
)

write_sheet <- function(wb, sheet_name, data) {
  addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)
  writeData(wb, sheet_name, data)
  addStyle(
    wb, sheet = sheet_name, style = header_style,
    rows = 1, cols = 1:ncol(data), gridExpand = TRUE
  )
  setColWidths(wb, sheet = sheet_name, cols = 1:ncol(data), widths = "auto")
  freezePane(wb, sheet = sheet_name, firstRow = TRUE)
  addFilter(wb, sheet = sheet_name, row = 1, cols = 1:ncol(data))
}

write_sheet(wb, "Table1_like", table1_like)
write_sheet(wb, "Table2_reactions", table2_like)
write_sheet(wb, "Table2_parameters", table2_parameters_like)
write_sheet(wb, "Table3_fluxes", table3_fluxes_like)
write_sheet(wb, "Table3_fractions", table3_fractions_like)

safe_temp_root <- file.path(output_dir, "temp_openxlsx")
if (!dir.exists(safe_temp_root)) {
  dir.create(safe_temp_root, recursive = TRUE)
}

old_tmp <- Sys.getenv("TMPDIR", unset = "")
Sys.setenv(TMPDIR = safe_temp_root)

excel_path <- file.path(output_dir, "Model_tables_like_paper.xlsx")

excel_saved <- tryCatch({
  saveWorkbook(wb, excel_path, overwrite = TRUE)
  TRUE
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Excel export failed: ", e$message)
  FALSE
})

if (nzchar(old_tmp)) {
  Sys.setenv(TMPDIR = old_tmp)
}

if (excel_saved) {
  cat("\nExcel workbook saved successfully:\n", excel_path, "\n", sep = "")
} else {
  cat(
    "\nExcel workbook was NOT saved.\n",
    "CSV files were created successfully, but openxlsx failed during workbook export.\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}

cat(
  "\nFiles saved to:\n", output_dir, "\n",
  "Accepted model rows rebuilt: ", nrow(df_model), "\n",
  "Accepted parameter rows: ", nrow(df_par), "\n",
  "Accepted raw flux rows: ", nrow(df_flux_raw), "\n\n",
  sep = ""
)


```



### Compare model fluxes and literature values

```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=16}


# ==============================================================================
# Compare model fluxes and literature values
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE
# Build comparison figures for metabolic fluxes by combining:
# 1) Agelas model output
# 2) Chondrosia reniformis model output
# 3) Dysidea avara model output
# 4) Agelas measured data
# 5) Literature values from de Kluijver et al. (2021) for Geodia
#
# MAIN GOALS
# - Read model-derived Table3 summary files from model output folders
# - Read measured Agelas summary data
# - Convert measured NOX into NO2 and NO3 using Kluijver partition fractions
# - Standardize metric names and assign each flux to a flow category
#   (Input, Internal, Output)
# - Harmonize currencies across datasets (C, N, O2)
# - Plot all datasets as bars with error bars
# - Produce separate comparison panels for C, N, and O2
#
# IMPORTANT LOGIC
# - Agelas, Chondrosia, and Dysidea are read from your model folders
# - Geodia is NOT read from a model folder; it is entered manually from literature
# - Agelas measured remains the real measured dataset
#
# ERROR BAR LOGIC
# - Agelas model:        Mean ± CI95 (calculated from Mean, SD, and N_nonNA)
# - Chondrosia model:    Mean ± CI95 (calculated from Mean, SD, and N_nonNA)
# - Dysidea model:       Mean ± CI95 (calculated from Mean, SD, and N_nonNA)
# - Agelas measured:     Mean ± CI95
# - Geodia model:        Mean ± SD (as reported in the paper)
# ==============================================================================

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) USER INPUT
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Folder containing Agelas Table3 output
agelas_tables_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260406_105009/tables_from_accepted_outputs"

# Folder containing Chondrosia Table3 output
chondrosia_tables_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260406_153814/tables_from_accepted_outputs"

# Folder containing Dysidea Table3 output
dysidea_tables_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260406_100935/tables_from_accepted_outputs"

# Measured summary table for Agelas
agelas_measured_file <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/Summary_tables/Agelas_oroides/SUMMARY_Agelas_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_volnorm.csv"

# Output file name
output_figure_name <- "combined_flux_comparison_panel_with_dysidea.png"

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) GLOBAL METRIC ORDER
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
metric_order <- c(
  "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",
  "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
  "Oxygen uptake (r12)",
  "Denitrification (r3)",
  "DNRA (r4)",
  "NH4 oxidation (r5)",
  "NO2 oxidation (r6)",
  "Production - nitrification (r7)",
  "Anammox (r8)",
  "Production - anammox (r9)",
  "Production (r10)",
  "Total DOM uptake (r11)",
  "NH4 exchange (r13)",
  "NO2 exchange (r15)",
  "NO3 release (r14)",
  "CO2 release (r16)",
  "N2 release (r17)"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) HELPER FUNCTION:
#    find the Table3_like_model_fluxes file inside a folder
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
find_table3_file <- function(tables_dir) {
  
  files <- list.files(
    path = tables_dir,
    pattern = "Table3_like_model_fluxes\\.csv$",
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  
  if (length(files) == 0) {
    stop("No Table3_like_model_fluxes.csv file found in:\n", tables_dir)
  }
  
  if (length(files) > 1) {
    message("More than one matching Table3 file found. Using the first one:\n", files[1])
  }
  
  files[1]
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) HELPER FUNCTION:
#    calculate CI95 half-width from Mean, SD, and n
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
calc_ci95_halfwidth <- function(mean, sd, n) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(mean) | is.na(sd) | is.na(n) | n < 2,
    NA_real_,
    qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * sd / sqrt(n)
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) HELPER FUNCTION:
#    read one model table from folder and prepare it for plotting
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# For Agelas, Chondrosia, and Dysidea, uncertainty is shown as true CI95
# calculated from Mean, SD, and N_nonNA.
read_model_from_folder <- function(tables_dir, dataset_name) {
  
  model_file <- find_table3_file(tables_dir)
  model_df <- read_csv(model_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  required_cols <- c("Metric", "Currency", "Mean", "SD", "N_nonNA")
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(model_df))
  
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(
      "The model file is missing required columns needed for CI95:\n",
      paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "),
      "\nFile used:\n",
      model_file
    )
  }
  
  model_df %>%
    mutate(
      Flow_category = case_when(
        Metric %in% c(
          "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",
          "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
          "Oxygen uptake (r12)"
        ) ~ "Input",
        
        Metric %in% c(
          "NO3 release (r14)",
          "CO2 release (r16)",
          "N2 release (r17)"
        ) ~ "Output",
        
        Metric %in% c(
          "Denitrification (r3)",
          "DNRA (r4)",
          "NH4 oxidation (r5)",
          "NO2 oxidation (r6)",
          "Production - nitrification (r7)",
          "Anammox (r8)",
          "Production - anammox (r9)",
          "Production (r10)",
          "Total DOM uptake (r11)",
          "NH4 exchange (r13)",
          "NO2 exchange (r15)"
        ) ~ "Internal",
        
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      
      # Use the available sample count column from the summary table
      n_for_ci = N_nonNA,
      
      # Plot absolute flux values to preserve the current figure design
      Mean_abs = abs(Mean),
      
      # True 95% confidence interval half-width
      CI95_half = calc_ci95_halfwidth(mean = Mean, sd = SD, n = n_for_ci),
      
      # Symmetric CI around the plotted absolute mean
      CI_low  = pmax(0, Mean_abs - CI95_half),
      CI_high = Mean_abs + CI95_half,
      
      Dataset = dataset_name
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Flow_category)) %>%
    mutate(
      Flow_category = factor(Flow_category, levels = c("Input", "Internal", "Output")),
      Currency = factor(Currency, levels = c("C", "N", "O2")),
      Metric = factor(Metric, levels = metric_order)
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) READ MEASURED AGELAS DATA AND PREPARE FOR PLOTTING
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
measured_df <- read_csv(agelas_measured_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

required_measured_cols <- c(
  "parameter",
  "FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)",
  "FluxVol_day_ci95 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)"
)

missing_measured_cols <- setdiff(required_measured_cols, names(measured_df))

if (length(missing_measured_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Measured file is missing required columns:\n",
    paste(missing_measured_cols, collapse = ", "),
    "\nFile used:\n",
    agelas_measured_file
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6A) Helpers for NOx partition from Kluijver et al. (2020)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
orig_NO2 <- -0.114
orig_NO3 <- -1.356

frac_NO2_from_NOx <- abs(orig_NO2) / (abs(orig_NO2) + abs(orig_NO3))
frac_NO3_from_NOx <- abs(orig_NO3) / (abs(orig_NO2) + abs(orig_NO3))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6B) Expand NOX into NO2 and NO3 for measured Agelas data
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
measured_df_expanded <- bind_rows(
  
  measured_df,
  
  measured_df %>%
    filter(parameter == "NOX") %>%
    mutate(
      parameter = "NO2",
      `FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)` =
        `FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)` * frac_NO2_from_NOx,
      `FluxVol_day_ci95 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)` =
        `FluxVol_day_ci95 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)` * frac_NO2_from_NOx
    ),
  
  measured_df %>%
    filter(parameter == "NOX") %>%
    mutate(
      parameter = "NO3",
      `FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)` =
        `FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)` * frac_NO3_from_NOx,
      `FluxVol_day_ci95 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)` =
        `FluxVol_day_ci95 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)` * frac_NO3_from_NOx
    )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6C) Standardize measured data to model-like metric names
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
measured_plot <- measured_df_expanded %>%
  mutate(
    Metric = case_when(
      parameter %in% c("NEuk_C", "PEuk_C", "Pro_C", "Syn_C") ~ "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",
      parameter %in% c("NEuk_N", "PEuk_N", "Pro_N", "Syn_N") ~ "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",
      parameter %in% c("DOC", "DON") ~ "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
      parameter == "O2" ~ "Oxygen uptake (r12)",
      parameter == "DIC_pH" ~ "CO2 release (r16)",
      parameter == "NH4" ~ "NH4 exchange (r13)",
      parameter == "NO2" ~ "NO2 exchange (r15)",
      parameter == "NO3" ~ "NO3 release (r14)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Currency = case_when(
      parameter %in% c("NEuk_C", "PEuk_C", "Pro_C", "Syn_C", "DOC", "DIC_pH") ~ "C",
      parameter %in% c("NEuk_N", "PEuk_N", "Pro_N", "Syn_N", "DON", "NH4", "NO2", "NO3") ~ "N",
      parameter == "O2" ~ "O2",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Flow_category = case_when(
      Metric %in% c(
        "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",
        "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
        "Oxygen uptake (r12)"
```
