```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=16}
      ) ~ "Input",
      Metric %in% c(
        "NO3 release (r14)",
        "CO2 release (r16)"
      ) ~ "Output",
      Metric %in% c(
        "NH4 exchange (r13)",
        "NO2 exchange (r15)"
      ) ~ "Internal",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Metric), !is.na(Currency), !is.na(Flow_category)) %>%
  group_by(Metric, Currency, Flow_category) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_abs = sum(abs(`FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`), na.rm = TRUE),
    CI95_abs = sum(abs(`FluxVol_day_ci95 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CI_low = pmax(0, Mean_abs - CI95_abs),
    CI_high = Mean_abs + CI95_abs,
    Flow_category = factor(Flow_category, levels = c("Input", "Internal", "Output")),
    Currency = factor(Currency, levels = c("C", "N", "O2")),
    Metric = factor(Metric, levels = metric_order),
    Dataset = "Agelas measured"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) READ MODEL TABLES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
agelas_model_plot <- read_model_from_folder(
  tables_dir = agelas_tables_dir,
  dataset_name = "Agelas model"
)

chondrosia_model_plot <- read_model_from_folder(
  tables_dir = chondrosia_tables_dir,
  dataset_name = "Chondrosia model"
)

dysidea_model_plot <- read_model_from_folder(
  tables_dir = dysidea_tables_dir,
  dataset_name = "Dysidea model"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 8) LITERATURE MODEL VALUES:
#    Smaller sponges from de Kluijver et al. (2021)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
paper_small_model <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Metric,                                  ~Currency, ~Flow_category, ~Mean_abs, ~SD_abs,
  "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",             "C",       "Input",         abs(0.15),   abs(0.090),
  "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",             "N",       "Input",         abs(0.031),  abs(0.019),
  "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)", "C",   "Input",         abs(14.0),   abs(4.5),
  "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)", "N",   "Input",         abs(1.9),    abs(0.74),
  "Denitrification (r3)",                   "C",       "Internal",      abs(0.81),   abs(0.62),
  "Denitrification (r3)",                   "N",       "Internal",      abs(0.47),   abs(0.35),
  "DNRA (r4)",                              "C",       "Internal",      abs(4.5),    abs(2.7),
  "DNRA (r4)",                              "N",       "Internal",      abs(1.9),    abs(1.1),
  "NH4 oxidation (r5)",                     "N",       "Internal",      abs(3.0),    abs(1.2),
  "NO2 oxidation (r6)",                     "N",       "Internal",      abs(2.9),    abs(1.2),
  "Production - nitrification (r7)",        "C",       "Internal",      abs(0.28),   abs(0.13),
  "Production - nitrification (r7)",        "N",       "Internal",      abs(0.067),  abs(0.032),
  "Anammox (r8)",                           "N",       "Internal",      abs(0.011),  abs(0.0094),
  "Production (r10)",                       "C",       "Internal",      abs(6.5),    abs(2.9),
  "Production (r10)",                       "N",       "Internal",      abs(1.5),    abs(0.68),
  "Total DOM uptake (r11)",                 "C",       "Internal",      abs(19.3),   abs(4.0),
  "Total DOM uptake (r11)",                 "N",       "Internal",      abs(2.6),    abs(0.79),
  "Oxygen uptake (r12)",                    "O2",      "Input",         abs(15.8),   abs(2.5),
  "NH4 exchange (r13)",                     "N",       "Internal",      abs(0.017),  abs(0.26),
  "NO3 release (r14)",                      "N",       "Output",        abs(-0.59),  abs(0.32),
  "NO2 exchange (r15)",                     "N",       "Internal",      abs(-0.022), abs(0.027),
  "CO2 release (r16)",                      "C",       "Output",        abs(-12.9),  abs(2.1),
  "N2 release (r17)",                       "N",       "Output",        abs(-0.49),  abs(0.37)
) %>%
  mutate(
    CI_low = pmax(0, Mean_abs - SD_abs),
    CI_high = Mean_abs + SD_abs,
    Flow_category = factor(Flow_category, levels = c("Input", "Internal", "Output")),
    Currency = factor(Currency, levels = c("C", "N", "O2")),
    Metric = factor(Metric, levels = metric_order),
    Dataset = "Geodia model"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 9) OPTIONAL OVERLAY FIGURE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
pd_overlay <- position_dodge(width = 0.72)

p_overlay <- ggplot(
  agelas_model_plot,
  aes(x = Metric, y = Mean_abs, fill = Currency, group = Currency)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72, position = pd_overlay, color = NA) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = CI_low,
      ymax = CI_high,
      color = Currency
    ),
    width = 0.18,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    position = pd_overlay,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = measured_plot,
    aes(x = Metric, y = Mean_abs, group = Currency),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    position = pd_overlay,
    shape = 23,
    size = 3.1,
    fill = "black",
    color = "white",
    stroke = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = measured_plot,
    aes(
      x = Metric,
      ymin = CI_low,
      ymax = CI_high,
      group = Currency
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    position = pd_overlay,
    width = 0.12,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = paper_small_model,
    aes(x = Metric, y = Mean_abs, group = Currency),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    position = pd_overlay,
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.0,
    fill = "#D95F5F",
    color = "white",
    stroke = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = paper_small_model,
    aes(
      x = Metric,
      ymin = CI_low,
      ymax = CI_high,
      group = Currency
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    position = pd_overlay,
    width = 0.10,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    color = "#D95F5F"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Flow_category, scales = "free") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "C"  = "#BFE3C0",
      "N"  = "#D6C2F0",
      "O2" = "#BFDDF5"
    )
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "C"  = "#7EAF80",
      "N"  = "#9E84CC",
      "O2" = "#6EA7D1"
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Metric",
    y = expression(paste("Absolute flux (", mu, "mol day"^-1, " cm"^-3, ")")),
    fill = "Currency",
    title = "Model fluxes with measured and literature values overlaid"
  )

p_overlay

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10) COMBINE DATASETS FOR BAR COMPARISON
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
bars_all_df <- bind_rows(
  
  agelas_model_plot %>%
    transmute(
      Metric, Currency, Flow_category,
      Mean_abs,
      CI_low,
      CI_high,
      Dataset
    ),
  
  chondrosia_model_plot %>%
    transmute(
      Metric, Currency, Flow_category,
      Mean_abs,
      CI_low,
      CI_high,
      Dataset
    ),
  
  dysidea_model_plot %>%
    transmute(
      Metric, Currency, Flow_category,
      Mean_abs,
      CI_low,
      CI_high,
      Dataset
    ),
  
  paper_small_model %>%
    transmute(
      Metric, Currency, Flow_category,
      Mean_abs,
      CI_low,
      CI_high,
      Dataset
    )
  
) %>%
  mutate(
    Dataset = factor(
      Dataset,
      levels = c(
        "Agelas model",
        "Chondrosia model",
        "Dysidea model",
        "Geodia model"
      )
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 11) METRIC ORDER PER CURRENCY
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
metric_order_C <- c(
  "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",
  "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
  "Denitrification (r3)",
  "DNRA (r4)",
  "Production - nitrification (r7)",
  "Production - anammox (r9)",
  "Production (r10)",
  "Total DOM uptake (r11)",
  "CO2 release (r16)"
)

metric_order_N <- c(
  "Bacteria assimilation (r1)",
  "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
  "Denitrification (r3)",
  "DNRA (r4)",
  "NH4 oxidation (r5)",
  "NO2 oxidation (r6)",
  "Production - nitrification (r7)",
  "Anammox (r8)",
  "Production - anammox (r9)",
  "Production (r10)",
  "Total DOM uptake (r11)",
  "NH4 exchange (r13)",
  "NO2 exchange (r15)",
  "NO3 release (r14)",
  "N2 release (r17)"
)

metric_order_O2 <- c(
  "Oxygen uptake (r12)"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 12) BAR PLOT FUNCTION WITH CONTROLLED Y SCALES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Shared scale for Carbon + Oxygen panels
shared_CO2_limit <- max(
  bars_all_df %>%
    filter(Currency %in% c("C", "O2")) %>%
    pull(CI_high),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# Separate shared scale for Nitrogen panel
shared_N_limit <- max(
  bars_all_df %>%
    filter(Currency == "N") %>%
    pull(CI_high),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

make_bar_plot <- function(currency_filter,
                          metric_order_use,
                          title_text,
                          y_limit) {
  
  plot_df <- bars_all_df %>%
    filter(Currency == currency_filter, Metric %in% metric_order_use) %>%
    mutate(Metric = factor(Metric, levels = metric_order_use))
  
  pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.82)
  
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Metric, y = Mean_abs, fill = Dataset)) +
    geom_col(
      width = 0.76,
      position = pd
    ) +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(
        ymin = CI_low,
        ymax = CI_high,
        color = Dataset
      ),
      width = 0.15,
      linewidth = 0.6,
      position = pd,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ Flow_category, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_limit)) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "Agelas model"     = "#A8D8F0",
        "Chondrosia model" = "#BFE3C0",
        "Dysidea model"    = "#F2D39B",
        "Geodia model"     = "#F3C4D0"
      ),
      labels = c(
        "Agelas model"     = "Agelas oroides",
        "Chondrosia model" = "Chondrosia reniformis",
        "Dysidea model"    = "Dysidea avara",
        "Geodia model"     = "Geodia barretti"
      )
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Agelas model"     = "#7FB8D8",
        "Chondrosia model" = "#8FBF91",
        "Dysidea model"    = "#D8B36F",
        "Geodia model"     = "#D99AAA"
      )
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.text = element_text(face = "italic"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) +
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = expression(paste("Absolute flux (", mu, "mol day"^-1, " cm"^-3, ")")),
      fill = NULL,
      title = title_text
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 13) BUILD PLOTS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

p_C <- make_bar_plot(
  currency_filter = "C",
  metric_order_use = metric_order_C,
  title_text = "Carbon fluxes comparison",
  y_limit = shared_CO2_limit
)

p_N <- make_bar_plot(
  currency_filter = "N",
  metric_order_use = metric_order_N,
  title_text = "Nitrogen fluxes comparison",
  y_limit = shared_N_limit
)

p_O2 <- make_bar_plot(
  currency_filter = "O2",
  metric_order_use = metric_order_O2,
  title_text = "Oxygen flux comparison",
  y_limit = shared_CO2_limit
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 14) PRINT INDIVIDUAL PLOTS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
p_C
p_N
p_O2

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 15) COMBINE THE THREE PLOTS INTO ONE MULTI-PANEL FIGURE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
o2_row <- (
  p_O2 | guide_area()
) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(0.3, 0.3, 0.3), guides = "collect")

combined_panel <- (
  (p_C + theme(legend.position = "none")) /
  (p_N + theme(legend.position = "none")) /
  o2_row
) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  plot_layout(
    heights = c(1, 1, 1)
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.7, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      keywidth = unit(3, "lines"),
      keyheight = unit(3, "lines")
    )
  )

combined_panel

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 16) SAVE FIGURE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/LIM png/Compare_model_fluxes.png",
  plot = combined_panel,
  width = 16,
  height = 16,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/LIM png/Compare_model_fluxes.svg",
  plot = combined_panel,
  width = 16,
  height = 16,
  dpi = 300
)

```


### Compare model results vs direct measurements for the 3 study species
```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=16}

# ==============================================================================
# Compare Model Fluxes vs. Measured Data for All Species
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE:
# 1) Load model outputs for Agelas, Chondrosia, and Dysidea.
# 2) Load the combined measured summary file for all species.
# 3) Harmonize naming and currencies.
# 4) Create a side-by-side bar plot (Measured vs. Model).
# ==============================================================================

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) PATHS & INPUTS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Model directories (from your previous code)
agelas_dir     <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260512_162324/tables_from_accepted_outputs"
chondrosia_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260406_153814/tables_from_accepted_outputs"
dysidea_dir    <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260406_100935/tables_from_accepted_outputs"

# New Measured summary file (All species)
measured_all_file <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/Summary_tables/All_3_species_recalc_flux_with_all_volumes/SUMMARY_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) HELPER: READ MODEL DATA
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# We extract Mean and the Q05-Q95 range as the "Model" uncertainty
read_and_label_model <- function(path, species_name) {
  file_path <- list.files(path, pattern = "Table3_like_model_fluxes\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)[1]
  read_csv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    transmute(
      Species = species_name,
      Metric,
      Currency,
      Value = abs(Mean),
      Low   = abs(Q05),
      High  = abs(Q95),
      Source = "Model"
    )
}

model_data <- bind_rows(
  read_and_label_model(agelas_dir, "A. oroides"),
  read_and_label_model(chondrosia_dir, "C. reniformis"),
  read_and_label_model(dysidea_dir, "D. avara")
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) READ & PROCESS MEASURED DATA - גרסה חסינה
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
measured_raw <- read_csv(measured_all_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

measured_processed <- measured_raw %>%
  mutate(
    # הפיכת הפרמטר לאותיות גדולות למניעת בעיות איות
    p_upper = toupper(parameter), 
    
    Metric = case_when(
      p_upper %in% c("NEUK_C", "PEUK_C", "PRO_C", "SYN_C", "NEUK_N", "PEUK_N", "PRO_N", "SYN_N") ~ "Planktonic cells assimilation (r1)",
      p_upper %in% c("DOC", "DON") ~ "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
      p_upper == "O2"  ~ "Oxygen uptake (r12)",
      p_upper %in% c("DIC_PH", "DIC") ~ "CO2 release (r16)",
      p_upper == "NH4" ~ "NH4 exchange (r13)",
      
      # כאן אנחנו תופסים את כל הווריאציות של NOX או NO3 מהמדידות
      p_upper %in% c("NOX", "NO3") ~ "NO3 release (r14)", 
      
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Currency = case_when(
      grepl("_C$|DOC|DIC", p_upper) ~ "C",
      grepl("_N$|DON|NH4|NOX|NO3", p_upper) ~ "N",
      p_upper == "O2" ~ "O2",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Species = case_when(
      grepl("Agelas", species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "A. oroides",
      grepl("Chondrosia", species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "C. reniformis",
      grepl("Dysidea", species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "D. avara",
      TRUE ~ species
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Metric)) %>%
  group_by(Species, Metric, Currency) %>%
  summarise(
    Value = sum(abs(`FluxVol_day_mean (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`)),
    Err   = sum(abs(`FluxVol_day_ci95 (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Low = pmax(0, Value - Err),
    High = Value + Err,
    Source = "Measured"
  )

# --- בדיקה מהירה: האם ה-NO3 נכנס לטבלה המדודה? ---
check_nox <- measured_processed %>% filter(grepl("NO3", Metric))
print("בדיקת נתוני NO3 מדודים:")
print(check_nox)



# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) COMBINE AND FILTER FOR COMMON METRICS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# We only want to plot metrics that exist in BOTH datasets for a clean comparison
final_df <- bind_rows(model_data, measured_processed) %>%
  mutate(
    Source = factor(Source, levels = c("Measured", "Model")),
    Currency = factor(Currency, levels = c("C", "N", "O2"))
  )


# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) PRE-PROCESSING: HARMONIZING & FILTERING (Fixed for NO3 visibility)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
final_df_finalized <- final_df %>%
  # שלב א': איחוד שמות - כאן אנחנו מבטיחים ש-NOX ו-NO3 "ייפגשו" באותה מטריקה
  mutate(Metric = case_when(
    grepl("NOX|NO3", Metric, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "NO3 release (r14)",
    grepl("Bacteria", Metric) ~ "Planktonic cells assimilation (r1)",
    TRUE ~ Metric
  )) %>%
  # שלב ב': קיצור שמות המינים
  mutate(Species = case_when(
    grepl("Agelas|A. oroides", Species) ~ "A. oroides",
    grepl("Chondrosia|C. reniformis", Species) ~ "C. reniformis",
    grepl("Dysidea|D. avara", Species) ~ "D. avara",
    TRUE ~ Species
  )) %>%
  # שלב ג': סינון - רק מה שיש לו גם מודל וגם מדידות (חשוב: אחרי איחוד השמות!)
  group_by(Metric, Currency) %>%
  filter(any(Source == "Measured") & any(Source == "Model")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # שלב ד': הסרת NO2 וניקוי
  filter(!grepl("NO2", Metric)) %>%
  # שלב ה': לוגיקת צבעי מילוי
  mutate(fill_logic = ifelse(Source == "Measured", "white", 
                            case_when(
                              Species == "A. oroides" ~ "#A8D8F0",
                              Species == "C. reniformis" ~ "#BFE3C0",
                              Species == "D. avara" ~ "#F2D39B"
                            )))


# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FUNCTION: make_final_comparison_plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PURPOSE:
# Create one panel (C / N / O2) with:
# - white background
# - no grid
# - black panel border
# - black strip border
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

make_final_comparison_plot <- function(currency_filter, title_text) {
  
  df_plot <- final_df_finalized %>%
    filter(Currency == currency_filter) %>%
    mutate(
      Species = factor(Species, levels = c("A. oroides", "C. reniformis", "D. avara")),
      Source  = factor(Source, levels = c("Measured", "Model"))
    )
  
  ggplot(
    df_plot,
    aes(
      x = Species,
      y = Value,
      fill = fill_logic,
      colour = Species,
      group = Source
    )
  ) +
    
    geom_col(
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
      width = 0.6,
      linewidth = 0.9
    ) +
    
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(ymin = Low, ymax = High),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
      width = 0.2,
      linewidth = 0.8
    ) +
    
    facet_wrap(~ Metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2)+
    
    scale_fill_identity() +
    
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(
      "A. oroides"    = "#A8D8F0",
      "C. reniformis" = "#BFE3C0",
      "D. avara"      = "#F2D39B"
    )) +
    
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = "Flux (µmol day⁻¹ cm⁻³)",
      title = title_text
    ) +
    
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      # remove all grids
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      
      # white backgrounds
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
      
      # black border around each facet strip
      strip.text = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black"),
      
      # axes
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "italic", angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, colour = "black"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 17, colour = "black"),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black"),
      
      # title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      
      # spacing
      panel.spacing = unit(0.8, "lines"),
      
      # no legend here
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) יצירת הגרפים מחדש (חשוב להריץ את זה עכשיו!)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# הפונקציה עכשיו מוגדרת עם legend.position = "right" כדי לאפשר איסוף
p_C  <- make_final_comparison_plot("C", "Carbon: Measured vs. Model")
p_N  <- make_final_comparison_plot("N", "Nitrogen: Measured vs. Model")
p_O2 <- make_final_comparison_plot("O2", "Oxygen: Measured vs. Model")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7A) CREATE A MANUAL LEGEND (FIXED - symmetric Model vs Measured)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

legend_df <- data.frame(
  x = 1,
  y = c(3, 2, 1, 0, -1, -2),
  type = c("Model", "Model", "Model",
           "Measured", "Measured", "Measured"),
  species = rep(c("A", "C", "D"), 2)
)

p_manual_legend <- ggplot() +
  
  # MODEL = filled squares
  geom_point(
    data = subset(legend_df, type == "Model"),
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = species),
    shape = 22,
    size = 5,
    stroke = 0.8,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  
  # MEASURED = empty squares
  geom_point(
    data = subset(legend_df, type == "Measured"),
    aes(x = x, y = y, colour = species),
    shape = 22,
    size = 5,
    stroke = 1.2,
    fill = "white"
  ) +
  
  # species colors
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "A" = "#A8D8F0",
    "C" = "#BFE3C0",
    "D" = "#F2D39B"
  )) +
  
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "A" = "#A8D8F0",
    "C" = "#BFE3C0",
    "D" = "#F2D39B"
  )) +
  
  # labels
  annotate("text", x = 1.4, y = 2,  label = "Model",    hjust = 0, size = 4.2) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.4, y = -1, label = "Measured", hjust = 0, size = 4.2) +
  
  # clean appearance
  xlim(0.8, 2.4) +
  ylim(-2.5, 3.5) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7B) REMOVE AUTOMATIC LEGENDS FROM THE MAIN PANELS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

p_C_clean  <- p_C  + theme(legend.position = "none")
p_N_clean  <- p_N  + theme(legend.position = "none")
p_O2_clean <- p_O2 + theme(legend.position = "none")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7C) BUILD THE BOTTOM ROW: PANEL C + MANUAL LEGEND
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

bottom_row <- ( p_O2_clean | p_manual_legend |plot_spacer() ) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(0.5, 0.3, 0.2))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7D) COMBINE EVERYTHING INTO THE FINAL FIGURE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
final_combined <- (
  p_C_clean /
  p_N_clean /
  bottom_row
) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.35, 1.35, 0.675)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")


# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7E) PRINT THE FINAL FIGURE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

final_combined
```



### Boxplot version with the same style as the final barplot figure

```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=16}

# ==============================================================================
# Boxplot version with the same style as the final barplot figure
# Compare raw model distributions vs raw measured fluxes for all species
# ==============================================================================

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
library(ggh4x)
library(tibble)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1) PATHS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

agelas_run_dir     <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260406_105009"
chondrosia_run_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260406_153814"
dysidea_run_dir    <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/SMALL_run_20260406_100935"

measured_raw_file  <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/Summary_tables/All_3_species_recalc_flux_with_all_volumes/RAW_ALLSPECIES_S6_NEuk_allometric_C_plus_Redfield_N_recalc_flux_allvol.csv"

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2) MANUAL Y-AXIS LIMITS FOR EACH METRIC AND CURRENCY
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

y_limits_tbl <- tribble(
  ~Currency, ~Metric,                                      ~ymax,
  "C",       "CO2 release (r16)",                           40,
  "C",       "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",  35,
  "C",       "Planktonic cells assimilation (r1)",          25,
  
  "N",       "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",   8,
  "N",       "NH4 exchange (r13)",                           4,
  "N",       "NO3 release (r14)",                            4,
  "N",       "Planktonic cells assimilation (r1)",           4,
  
  "O2",      "Oxygen uptake (r12)",                         70
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3) HELPER: READ AND REBUILD ONE MODEL RUN
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# This follows the same logic as your summary-table code:
# 1) average xsample draws within each accepted_id
# 2) rebuild accepted_parameter_sets from long to wide
# 3) join both tables
# 4) calculate derived variables needed for the final figure

read_model_box_data <- function(run_dir, species_name) {
  
  flux_file  <- file.path(run_dir, "accepted_flux_samples.csv")
  param_file <- file.path(run_dir, "accepted_parameter_sets.csv")
  
  # --- read raw files ---
  df_flux_raw <- read_csv(flux_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  df_par_raw  <- read_csv(param_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # --- average flux draws within accepted_id ---
  df_flux_mean <- df_flux_raw %>%
    group_by(accepted_id) %>%
    summarise(
      BacNupt             = mean(BacNupt, na.rm = TRUE),
      DONupt              = mean(DONupt, na.rm = TRUE),
      denit               = mean(denit, na.rm = TRUE),
      DNRA                = mean(DNRA, na.rm = TRUE),
      nitr_NH4            = mean(nitr_NH4, na.rm = TRUE),
      nitr_NO2            = mean(nitr_NO2, na.rm = TRUE),
      biomassprod_nitrif  = mean(biomassprod_nitrif, na.rm = TRUE),
      anammox             = mean(anammox, na.rm = TRUE),
      biomassprod_anammox = mean(biomassprod_anammox, na.rm = TRUE),
      Prod                = mean(Prod, na.rm = TRUE),
      tDONupt             = mean(tDONupt, na.rm = TRUE),
      cOxyupt             = mean(cOxyupt, na.rm = TRUE),
      cNH4upt             = mean(cNH4upt, na.rm = TRUE),
      cNO3rel             = mean(cNO3rel, na.rm = TRUE),
      cNO2upt             = mean(cNO2upt, na.rm = TRUE),
      CO2rel              = mean(CO2rel, na.rm = TRUE),
      N2rel               = mean(N2rel, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # --- rebuild parameter table from long to wide ---
  df_par <- df_par_raw %>%
    mutate(val = as.numeric(val)) %>%
    select(accepted_id, name, val) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = name, values_from = val) %>%
    mutate(
      fp_C_DOM   = 1 - fr_C_DOM,
      fp_C_Bac   = 1 - fr_C_Bac,
      fp_C_Denit = 1 - fr_C_Denit,
      fp_C_DNRA  = 1 - fr_C_DNRA
    )
  
  # --- join flux means + parameters ---
  df_model <- df_flux_mean %>%
    left_join(df_par, by = "accepted_id") %>%
    mutate(
      Species = species_name,
      
      # direct exchange variables from parameter sets
      Oxyupt = Oxyupt,
      NH4upt = NH4upt,
      NO2upt = NO2upt,
      NO3rel = NO3rel,
      DOCupt = DOCupt,
      BacCupt = BacCupt,
      
      # derived variables from your summary code
      r10_totCprod   = Prod * CN_Spo,
      r2_CProd_DOC   = DONupt * CN_DOM * fp_C_DOM,
      r3_CProd_denit = denit  * CN_DOM * fp_C_Denit,
      r4_CProd_DNRA  = DNRA   * CN_DOM * fp_C_DNRA
    )
  
  # --- map to the same final metric names used in the barplot figure ---
  model_long <- bind_rows(
    
    # Carbon
    df_model %>%
      transmute(
        Species,
        Replicate_ID = as.character(accepted_id),
        Metric   = "Planktonic cells assimilation (r1)",
        Currency = "C",
        Value    = abs(BacCupt),
        Source   = "Model"
      ),
    
    df_model %>%
      transmute(
        Species,
        Replicate_ID = as.character(accepted_id),
        Metric   = "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
        Currency = "C",
        Value    = abs(DOCupt),
        Source   = "Model"
      ),
    
    df_model %>%
      transmute(
        Species,
        Replicate_ID = as.character(accepted_id),
        Metric   = "CO2 release (r16)",
        Currency = "C",
        Value    = abs(CO2rel),
        Source   = "Model"
      ),
    
    # Nitrogen
    df_model %>%
      transmute(
        Species,
        Replicate_ID = as.character(accepted_id),
        Metric   = "Planktonic cells assimilation (r1)",
        Currency = "N",
        Value    = abs(BacNupt),
        Source   = "Model"
      ),
    
    df_model %>%
      transmute(
        Species,
        Replicate_ID = as.character(accepted_id),
        Metric   = "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
        Currency = "N",
        Value    = abs(DONupt),
        Source   = "Model"
      ),
    
    df_model %>%
      transmute(
        Species,
        Replicate_ID = as.character(accepted_id),
        Metric   = "NH4 exchange (r13)",
        Currency = "N",
        Value    = abs(NH4upt),
        Source   = "Model"
      ),
    
    df_model %>%
      transmute(
        Species,
        Replicate_ID = as.character(accepted_id),
        Metric   = "NO3 release (r14)",
        Currency = "N",
        Value    = abs(NO3rel),
        Source   = "Model"
      ),
    
    # Oxygen
    df_model %>%
      transmute(
        Species,
        Replicate_ID = as.character(accepted_id),
        Metric   = "Oxygen uptake (r12)",
        Currency = "O2",
        Value    = abs(Oxyupt),
        Source   = "Model"
      )
  )
  
  return(model_long)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4) BUILD MODEL DATA FOR ALL SPECIES
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

model_box_data <- bind_rows(
  read_model_box_data(agelas_run_dir, "A. oroides"),
  read_model_box_data(chondrosia_run_dir, "C. reniformis"),
  read_model_box_data(dysidea_run_dir, "D. avara")
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5) READ RAW MEASURED DATA AND AGGREGATE TO MATCH THE FIGURE LOGIC
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# We aggregate at the unique_code level, because each unique_code is one measured
# replicate. Parameters that belong to the same final metric are summed within
# unique_code exactly like in your summary logic.

measured_raw <- read_csv(measured_raw_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

measured_box_data <- measured_raw %>%
  mutate(
    p_upper = toupper(parameter),
    
    Metric = case_when(
      p_upper %in% c("NEUK_C", "PEUK_C", "PRO_C", "SYN_C",
                     "NEUK_N", "PEUK_N", "PRO_N", "SYN_N") ~ "Planktonic cells assimilation (r1)",
      p_upper %in% c("DOC", "DON") ~ "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
      p_upper == "O2"  ~ "Oxygen uptake (r12)",
      p_upper %in% c("DIC_PH", "DIC") ~ "CO2 release (r16)",
      p_upper == "NH4" ~ "NH4 exchange (r13)",
      p_upper %in% c("NOX", "NO3") ~ "NO3 release (r14)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    Currency = case_when(
      grepl("_C$|DOC|DIC", p_upper) ~ "C",
      grepl("_N$|DON|NH4|NOX|NO3", p_upper) ~ "N",
      p_upper == "O2" ~ "O2",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    Species = case_when(
      grepl("Agelas", species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "A. oroides",
      grepl("Chondrosia", species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "C. reniformis",
      grepl("Dysidea", species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "D. avara",
      TRUE ~ species
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Metric)) %>%
  group_by(unique_code, Species, Metric, Currency) %>%
  summarise(
    Value = sum(abs(`FluxVol_day (µmol day^-1 cm^-3)`), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    Species,
    Replicate_ID = as.character(unique_code),
    Metric,
    Currency,
    Value,
    Source = "Measured"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6) COMBINE + FINAL HARMONIZATION
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

box_df <- bind_rows(model_box_data, measured_box_data) %>%
  mutate(
    Species  = factor(Species, levels = c("A. oroides", "C. reniformis", "D. avara")),
    Source   = factor(Source,  levels = c("Measured", "Model")),
    Currency = factor(Currency, levels = c("C", "N", "O2"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(Metric, Currency) %>%
  filter(any(Source == "Measured") & any(Source == "Model")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    fill_logic = ifelse(
      Source == "Measured",
      "white",
      case_when(
        Species == "A. oroides"    ~ "#A8D8F0",
        Species == "C. reniformis" ~ "#BFE3C0",
        Species == "D. avara"      ~ "#F2D39B"
      )
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7) FUNCTION: MAKE ONE BOXPLOT PANEL
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Same style as your final barplot figure:
# - white background
# - no grid
# - black panel borders
# - black strip borders
# - italic species names
# - measured = white box with colored border
# - model = filled box with colored fill
# - manual Y limit for each facet

make_final_boxplot_panel <- function(currency_filter, title_text) {
  
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Define explicit facet order for each currency
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  metric_order <- case_when(
    currency_filter == "C"  ~ list(c(
      "CO2 release (r16)",
      "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
      "Planktonic cells assimilation (r1)"
    )),
    currency_filter == "N"  ~ list(c(
      "Dissolved organic matter assimilation (r2)",
      "NH4 exchange (r13)",
      "NO3 release (r14)",
      "Planktonic cells assimilation (r1)"
    )),
    currency_filter == "O2" ~ list(c(
      "Oxygen uptake (r12)"
    ))
  ) %>% unlist()
  
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Keep only relevant data and force Metric order explicitly
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  df_plot <- box_df %>%
    filter(Currency == currency_filter) %>%
    mutate(
      Metric = factor(Metric, levels = metric_order)
    )
  
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Keep only relevant manual Y limits and force the SAME order
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  metric_limits <- y_limits_tbl %>%
    filter(
      Currency == currency_filter,
      Metric %in% metric_order
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      Metric = factor(Metric, levels = metric_order)
    ) %>%
    arrange(Metric)
  
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Build one Y scale per facet in the exact facet order
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  y_scales_list <- lapply(metric_limits$ymax, function(ymax_val) {
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, ymax_val))
  })
  
  ggplot(
    df_plot,
    aes(
      x = Species,
      y = Value,
      fill = fill_logic,
      colour = Species,
      group = interaction(Species, Source)
    )
  ) +
    
    geom_boxplot(
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
      width = 0.6,
      linewidth = 0.9,
      outlier.shape = NA
    ) +
    
    facet_wrap(~ Metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    
    ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales(
      y = y_scales_list
    ) +
    
    scale_fill_identity() +
    
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(
      "A. oroides"    = "#A8D8F0",
      "C. reniformis" = "#BFE3C0",
      "D. avara"      = "#F2D39B"
    )) +
    
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = "Flux (µmol day⁻¹ cm⁻³)",
      title = title_text
    ) +
    
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic", angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, colour = "black"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 11, colour = "black"),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black"),
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
      panel.spacing = unit(0.8, "lines"),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 8) CREATE THE THREE PANELS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

p_C_box  <- make_final_boxplot_panel("C",  "Carbon: Measured vs. Model")
p_N_box  <- make_final_boxplot_panel("N",  "Nitrogen: Measured vs. Model")
p_O2_box <- make_final_boxplot_panel("O2", "Oxygen: Measured vs. Model")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 9) MANUAL LEGEND (same style as your final barplot figure)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

legend_df <- data.frame(
  x = 1,
  y = c(3, 2, 1, 0, -1, -2),
  type = c("Model", "Model", "Model",
           "Measured", "Measured", "Measured"),
  species = rep(c("A", "C", "D"), 2)
)

p_manual_legend_box <- ggplot() +
  
  # MODEL = filled squares
  geom_point(
    data = subset(legend_df, type == "Model"),
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = species),
    shape = 22,
    size = 5,
    stroke = 0.8,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  
  # MEASURED = empty squares
  geom_point(
    data = subset(legend_df, type == "Measured"),
    aes(x = x, y = y, colour = species),
    shape = 22,
    size = 5,
    stroke = 1.2,
    fill = "white"
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "A" = "#A8D8F0",
    "C" = "#BFE3C0",
    "D" = "#F2D39B"
  )) +
  
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "A" = "#A8D8F0",
    "C" = "#BFE3C0",
    "D" = "#F2D39B"
  )) +
  
  annotate("text", x = 1.4, y =  2, label = "Model",    hjust = 0, size = 4.2) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.4, y = -1, label = "Measured", hjust = 0, size = 4.2) +
  
  xlim(0.8, 2.4) +
  ylim(-2.5, 3.5) +
  
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 10) REMOVE AUTOMATIC LEGENDS
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

p_C_box_clean  <- p_C_box  + theme(legend.position = "none")
p_N_box_clean  <- p_N_box  + theme(legend.position = "none")
p_O2_box_clean <- p_O2_box + theme(legend.position = "none")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 11) BUILD BOTTOM ROW
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

bottom_row_box <- ( p_O2_box_clean | p_manual_legend_box | plot_spacer() ) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(0.5, 0.3, 0.2))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 12) FINAL COMBINED FIGURE
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

final_combined_box <- (
  p_C_box_clean /
  p_N_box_clean /
  bottom_row_box
) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.35, 1.35, 0.675)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 13) PRINT
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

final_combined_box


ggsave(
  filename = "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/LIM png/final_combined_box.png",
  plot = final_combined_box,
  width = 16,
  height = 16,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_4/Energy_budget/LIM png/final_combined_box.svg",
  plot = final_combined_box,
  width = 16,
  height = 16,
  dpi = 300
)

```
